title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:
Video Editor (Direct Response – Ecommerce Dog Supplement Brand)



We’re an ecommerce brand in the dog supplement space, and we’re looking for a direct response video editor who knows how to turn ideas into ads that actually convert.

This is NOT a traditional editing role.

We don’t need pretty edits — we need performance-driven creatives.



Important Context:

We don’t have a large library of original footage.

Your strength should be in sourcing, remixing, and building compelling visuals using:

Social media clips (TikTok, IG, YouTube)

B-rolls

AI-generated assets



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Turn scripts into high-converting video ads

- Visually communicate exactly what the script is saying (this is key)

- Source clips that match the story, pain points, and emotions in the script

- Use B-rolls and overlays to reinforce key claims and benefits

- Create multiple variations (hooks, angles, pacing) for testing

- Use AI tools to enhance production speed and creative output



What We Mean by “Direct Response Editor”:



- You don’t just edit… you translate persuasion into visuals.



If a script says:



“Your dog is silently suffering from joint pain…”

 - You show subtle signs of pain, slower movement, emotional cues



If a script says:



“Within weeks, owners noticed their dogs running again…”

- You show transformation, energy, before/after contrast



You understand:

- Hooks = scroll stopping visuals

- Pain points = emotionally compelling clips

- Benefits = clear, believable outcomes



Your job is to make the viewer feel and believe the script, not just hear it.





What We’re Looking For:



- Strong understanding of direct response / performance marketing

- Experience editing UGC-style ads

- Ability to match visuals to script messaging perfectly

- Skilled at sourcing and repurposing content

- Great instinct for pacing, hooks, and retention

- Comfortable using AI tools in your workflow



Tools You Might Be Using:



- CapCut / Premiere Pro / After Effects

- AI video tools (Runway, Pika, etc.)

- Voice AI (ElevenLabs or similar)

- ChatGPT or similar tools for ideation

- TikTok Creative Center / Meta Ad Library for research





This Role Is Perfect For You If:



- You think like a marketer, not just an editor

- You know how to make people stop scrolling in the first 3 seconds

- You can turn simple clips into ads that sell

- You’re resourceful and fast



How to Apply:



Send us:

Your portfolio (REQUIRED) – focus on ad creatives / UGC-style videos

A short message covering:

Your experience with direct response editing

How you approach turning a script into visuals

AI tools you actively use

(Optional) 1–2 ads you’ve made that performed well + why

Send me your proposal, and let’s crush this space together. We are looking for someone long term, and grow with us, and also own bonus in the company. 



If you can take a script and make people feel it, believe it, and buy… we want to work with you.



include the word EASY at the very top of your application

title: CRM & Lifecycle Marketing Manager
description:
CRM & Lifecycle Marketing Manager 

Location: Remote (Philippines-based) 

Type: Full-Time 

Level: Mid–Senior 

Daily Rate: ?2,000 – ?2,500 

________________________________________



About the Role



Hair Doctors is a fast-growing Australian haircare brand preparing to launch our e-commerce store. We are building our Shopify store and retention marketing infrastructure now, and we want an experienced CRM specialist involved from the beginning, not brought in after the fact to fix problems.



This means you will have a genuine seat at the table during the build phase. You will advise on platform selection, configure the integration correctly from day one, build our automation library, and then manage the channel ongoing as we grow.



If you have done this before, taken a brand from zero to a fully functioning CRM engine, this role is built for you.

________________________________________



Core Accountabilities

• Contribute to platform selection between Omnisend and Klaviyo based on our specific setup and growth stage

• Configure our chosen platform from scratch such as account setup, DNS authentication, sending domain, and Shopify integration

• Build our core automation flows: welcome series, abandoned cart, browse abandonment, post-purchase, and win-back

• Own post-acquisition lifecycle marketing end-to-end as we launch and scale i.e. flows, segmentation, campaigns, and reactivation

• Design a segmentation framework from the ground up, aligned to customer behaviour, lead source, and purchase history

• Monitor and report on flow analytics: open rate, click rate, revenue attribution, and unsubscribe rate

• Manage list hygiene and deliverability i.e. suppression lists, domain reputation, bounce and spam rates

• Ensure Shopify integration remains clean and all customer events are correctly mapped and firing

________________________________________



Who You Are

• Has built a Klaviyo or Omnisend setup from scratch for a new eCommerce brand. This is the core requirement

• Knows what good infrastructure looks like before a single
 is sent

• Demonstrated hands-on platform experience, not just familiarity. You have configured accounts end-to-end, built flows, and can read analytics critically

• Background in eCommerce or DTC brand environments

• Comfortable with Shopify data logic such as customer segments, purchase behaviour triggers, and product feed integration

• Self-directed and proactive, able to make good decisions independently during a build phase where not everything is defined yet

• 4+ years of relevant experience at mid-to-senior level

________________________________________



Platform Skills (Non-Negotiable)

• Has configured a Klaviyo or Omnisend account from zero including DNS setup, sending domain warm-up, and Shopify sync

• Can build automated flows from scratch: welcome series, abandoned cart, browse abandonment, post-purchase, win-back

• Understands trigger logic i.e. event-based vs time-based triggers, flow filters vs trigger filters, and why the distinction matters

• Can build and manage segments using behavioural, transactional, and demographic data

• Knows how to structure a suppression list to protect deliverability

• Understands how Shopify customer properties sync into Klaviyo/Omnisend i.e. native vs custom fields

• Can map Shopify events correctly: viewed product, added to cart, started checkout, placed order, fulfilled order

• Can set up and validate pixel and tracking script installation on Shopify

• Understands DNS configuration such as SPF, DKIM, DMARC records and their role in deliverability

• Knows how to warm a new sending domain correctly and monitor sender reputation

• Understands list hygiene practices — when and how to sunset unengaged subscribers

________________________________________



Data & Segmentation

• Designs a segmentation framework before building, not creates segments reactively after problems appear

• Understands RFM modelling i.e. recency, frequency, monetary value as segmentation inputs

• Can identify which lead sources (Meta vs TikTok) produce different behavioural profiles and build separate nurture paths accordingly

• Uses Shopify collections and product data dynamically in
 content

_______________________________________



How to Apply

Applications without evidence of hands-on platform experience will not be progressed. 



Please include:

• A specific example of a Klaviyo or Omnisend account you built from scratch i.e. what the brief was, what you built, and the outcome

• Your view on Klaviyo vs Omnisend for an early-stage Shopify brand and why

• Your approach to warming a new sending domain

• Your desired daily rate in PHP and your availability

• Any relevant certifications (Klaviyo Academy, Omnisend, etc.)

title: Web Designer & 3D Developer Needed – Premium AI Tech Agency Website with Live Voice Demo & Immersive Scroll Experience
description:
I'm building a next-generation tech agency that helps businesses implement cutting-edge technology — starting with AI voice automation. I need a world-class website that not only looks incredible but features a live, interactive AI voice demo so visitors can experience the technology firsthand before ever speaking to me.

The brand name is still being finalised, but the vision is clear: a site that feels like it's from the future — but simple enough that anyone can use it.



The Hero Feature

The centrepiece of the website should be a live AI voice demo where visitors can actually call or interact with an AI voice agent directly on the page. My strong preference is Retell AI integration as it is the platform I use for my actual business — so the demo would be a real representation of what I offer clients. If Retell AI isn't feasible, the next preference is ElevenLabs, and if neither are possible I'm open to other alternatives — but Retell is the priority. Think of it like an interactive product demo that sells itself.



3D & Scroll Experience

I'd love to explore an immersive 3D scroll experience — for example, a 3D AI brain or neural network that animates and reacts as the user scrolls down the page, visualising the AI in action. I'm open to the designer's creative interpretation of this — if you have a better idea that achieves the same "wow" effect, pitch it to me.



Design Vision

The one non-negotiable: despite the cool visuals, the site must feel simple, clear and approachable. My target clients include trades businesses like plumbers and electricians who aren't tech-savvy. Nothing should feel confusing or overwhelming.

Built to be flexible — as new technology emerges, the site should be easy to update and repurpose beyond just AI voice.



Requirements



Strong portfolio of modern, high-end websites — please include links

Must have experience with 3D design and scroll-based animations

Experience with interactive or demo-driven websites a big plus

Experience with Retell AI or ElevenLabs integration a significant advantage

What timeframe would you need to complete this project?

title: HIRING: VIDEO EDITOR (FULL-TIME)
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video / per concept

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



Highly valued skills:

- Graphic design experience. A strong eye for statics, headlines, and layouts. Experience making static ads that convert

- AI UGC: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Nano Banana

Candidates with either of these skill sets will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. No guarantees, no rushing. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The real opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

“I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have static ad / graphic design experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you.

Speak soon, Karos

title: Operations & Account Manager (U.S. Security – 24/7 Leadership Role)
description:
Operations & Account Manager (U.S. Security – 24/7 Leadership Role)

Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time | 9:00 AM–5:00 PM PST + On-Call



We operate a 24/7 U.S.-based security services company managing 50+ field employees. We are hiring a leader, not an assistant.



You will own scheduling, coverage control, client communication, and operational stability. If coverage breaks, you fix it. If a client escalates, you take control. If a guard becomes unstable, you address it.



This role requires real operations leadership.



Core Responsibilities

• Manage daily scheduling for 50+ U.S. field employees

• Prevent missed shifts and coverage gaps

• Handle call-offs, replacements, OT control, and shift adjustments

• Enforce SLA response times

• Communicate professionally with U.S. clients

• Maintain strict CRM documentation in GoHighLevel

• Coordinate with dispatch, HR, and finance

• Track attendance, performance issues, and guard stability



Required Experience (Strict)

• 3+ years in operations, dispatch, logistics, or 24/7 service environments

• Experience managing scheduling for 30+ field employees

• Experience handling call-offs and urgent coverage issues

• Experience using GoHighLevel (required)

• Experience with CRM/ticketing systems

• Basic HR experience (attendance, discipline, performance issues)

• Strong English communication (written + verbal)

• Comfortable making decisions without supervision



If you have not managed scheduling at scale, do not apply.



Schedule

• 9:00 AM–5:00 PM PST

• Must be available for urgent operational matters after hours



Compensation

• $6–$10 USD/hour

• Performance-based raises

• Growth path into Senior Operations Lead



Application Requirements (Mandatory)

Submit ALL of the following:

 1. Resume (PDF)

 2. 2-minute video explaining your experience managing 30+ field staff

 3. 60-second voice recording confirming PST + on-call availability

 4. List of systems you’ve used (must include GoHighLevel)



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



We are hiring ownership, not task followers.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Setup & Sales Operations Specialist
description:
GoHighLevel (GHL) Setup & Sales Operations Specialist



Industry: Promotional Products, Custom Apparel & T-Shirt Design (B2B)



Company: New US-Based Promo & Apparel Brand

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Hours: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Pay: $5–$9/hour (based on experience)

Contract: 30-day trial ? long-term full-time role based on performance



?



About the Role



We’re launching a new promotional products & custom apparel company (t-shirts, uniforms, branded merchandise) and are hiring a full-time GoHighLevel (GHL) Setup & Sales Operations Specialist. This person will own the initial CRM setup (Phase 1) and then help run day-to-day sales operations as the business scales.



This is a hands-on role for someone who already understands how promo/apparel businesses operate — including quoting workflows, artwork/proof processes, order timelines, and B2B client communication. You’ll work directly with the founder to build a clean, scalable sales engine from day one.



?



Phase 1 Responsibilities (First 30 Days)

 • Set up GoHighLevel CRM from scratch

 • Build sales pipelines for:

 • New Leads

 • Contacted

 • Qualified

 • Quote Sent

 • Follow-Up

 • Closed Won / Closed Lost

 • Create lead intake forms for:

 • Promo products

 • Apparel / t-shirt orders

 • Configure:

 • Tags (promo vs apparel, schools vs businesses, seasons, etc.)

 • Custom fields (quantity, budget, timeline, product type, design needed)

 • Set up basic automated follow-up sequences (SMS/email)

 • Prepare GHL so outbound callers can use it easily (call logs, notes, stage movement)

 • Document basic SOPs for sales workflow



?



Ongoing Responsibilities (After Phase 1)

 • Maintain and improve GHL pipelines and automations

 • Manage lead flow and ensure every lead is followed up properly

 • Support outbound calling operations (updating statuses, tagging, reminders)

 • Help monitor quote follow-ups and deal progress

 • Assist with reactivation campaigns for past customers

 • Maintain clean CRM data and reporting

 • Coordinate with the founder on continuous process improvements



?



Requirements (Must-Have)

 • Hands-on experience setting up and managing GoHighLevel (GHL)

 • Direct experience in promotional products, custom apparel, t-shirt design, print shops, embroidery, or screen printing

 • Understanding of B2B sales workflows (lead ? quote ? follow-up ? close)

 • Strong written and spoken English

 • Highly organized, detail-oriented, process-driven

 • Reliable internet connection and professional remote work setup

 • Ability to work U.S. business hours (or partial overlap)



?



Nice to Have (Strong Plus)

 • Experience supporting outbound sales or appointment setting teams

 • Familiarity with quoting tools or artwork/proof workflows

 • Basic understanding of Google Ads lead handling or CRM integrations

 • Experience creating simple SOPs or training materials for sales teams



?



What Success Looks Like (90-Day Outcomes)

 • GHL fully set up and cleanly organized

 • Every lead is properly tagged, tracked, and followed up

 • Quote follow-ups are automated and no deals fall through the cracks

 • Outbound team can operate smoothly inside GHL

 • Founder has clear visibility into pipeline, deals, and revenue



?



How to Apply



Please include:

 1. A short description of your experience with GoHighLevel

 2. Your experience in promo/apparel / print / t-shirt businesses

 3. Examples of CRMs or sales pipelines you’ve set up

 4. Your availability and preferred working hours

 5. Your expected hourly rate

Primary Responsibilities

Follow-Up Boss Mastery (Core)

Manage, optimize, and train on Follow-up Boss workflows, automation rules, and lead routing strategies tailored to our existing client pool

Set up and monitor
 drip campaigns, action plans, and multi-channel follow-up sequences

Streamline lead prioritization and client engagement systems to maximize conversion within current database

Generate monthly performance reports and provide actionable optimization recommendations

Serve as the expert guide as the team scales follow-up processes



CRM & Pipeline Management

Daily lead intake, qualification, and assignment within Follow-up Boss

Monitor and manage all inbound and outbound communications (calls,
s, texts)

Track pipeline health, follow-up completion rates, and client status updates

s with professionalism and urgency

Required Qualifications

 demonstrated Follow-up Boss expertise in a real estate environment

Comfort with real estate terminology, transaction cycles, and market research

Self-directed and able to work independently in a part-time capacity



Success Metrics & KPIs

The ideal candidate will achieve these measurable outcomes within the first 30 days and maintain them ongoing:

Follow up boss account is fully optimized within the first 30 days.

 Management: 95 percent of non-urgent
s responded to within 4 business hours; urgent matters flagged and escalated immediately

What We Offer

Clear growth path to long-term full time role.

title: Operations Controller / Dispatch Manager – Security Services (Leadership Role)
description:
Operations Controller / Dispatch Manager – Security Services (Leadership Role)



?



Job Overview



This is NOT a virtual assistant role.



This is a leadership position inside a live operations environment where you will be responsible for controlling active security services, managing guard coverage, handling client issues, and making real-time decisions.



You are not here to “assist.”

You are here to own outcomes and maintain control of operations.



If you are not comfortable taking responsibility, making decisions under pressure, and being held accountable — do not apply.



?



What You Will Be Responsible For

 • Owning guard coverage across multiple sites (scheduling, call-offs, replacements)

 • Handling real-time operational issues (no-shows, late guards, client complaints)

 • Leading communication with clients (phone +
) with confidence and control

 • Managing and updating all tickets, tasks, and issues (CRM systems)

 • Ensuring nothing is missed, delayed, or ignored

 • Coordinating across departments to resolve problems quickly

 • Escalating critical issues appropriately



This is a control tower role — you are responsible for keeping operations stable.



?



Leadership Expectations

 • You take ownership of problems — not pass them to others

 • You make decisions without waiting for instructions

 • You stay calm and in control during high-pressure situations

 • You think ahead and prevent issues before they happen

 • You communicate clearly, directly, and professionally



You are expected to operate like a manager, not an assistant.



?



Work Schedule

 • 45 hours per week (full-time)

 • Must be available during U.S. business hours

 • On-call availability for urgent issues (24/7 responsibility mindset required)



This role requires someone who understands that operations do not stop.



?



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



You must have experience in at least ONE of the following:

 • Dispatch or logistics coordination

 • Property management coordination

 • Field service scheduling

 • Call center TEAM LEAD (not agent)



If you do NOT have this experience, do not apply.



?



Compensation

 • $10–$13 per hour (based on experience)

 • Performance bonuses tied to operational performance

 • Long-term leadership opportunity



This is not an entry-level role.



?



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (MANDATORY)



You MUST answer all questions below:



1. Describe a real situation where operations broke down (missed shift, angry client, scheduling failure). What did you do step-by-step?



2. A guard calls off 1 hour before shift. The client is already frustrated. No replacement is immediately available. What do you do?



3. What systems have you used for scheduling, dispatch, or CRM?



4. Why should we trust you to handle a high-responsibility operations role?



Applications without answers will be rejected.



?



IMPORTANT



We are NOT looking for:

 • Virtual assistants

 • Data entry staff

 • Basic customer service agents



We are looking for someone who can lead operations, solve problems, and take ownership.



?





Include the word “CONTROL” at the top of your application to confirm you read this.

title: Revenue Manager - Short Term Rentals
description:
REVENUE MANAGER — SHORT-TERM RENTAL

Halo Hospitality · Knoxville, Tennessee · Part-Time Remote (opportunity to more work depending on skillset)

Short-Term Rental Property Management · 70+ Properties

Type: Part-Time, Long-Term | Pay: $600–$900/month USD | Hours: ~20 hrs/week | Reports To: Founder/Owner



ABOUT HALO HOSPITALITY

Halo Hospitality is a full-service vacation rental management company based in Knoxville, Tennessee. We manage 70+ short-term rental properties for property owners across the Knoxville market. We use Hostaway as our property management system and Wheelhouse for dynamic pricing. We are a growing, founder-led company and revenue management is one of our most important functions.



THE ROLE

We are hiring a part-time Revenue Manager to own pricing performance across our portfolio. This is a focused, specialized role — not a general VA position. You will be responsible for monitoring our listings daily, managing our pricing tool, maintaining our key date calendar, and making sure every property is positioned correctly in the market at all times.



This role is approximately 20 hours per week. You will work independently, report directly to the founder, and be expected to bring proactive recommendations — not just execute instructions.

If you have hands-on experience managing pricing for short-term rentals and know how to read occupancy data and make rate decisions, we want to hear from you.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN

Daily Monitoring



Review portfolio performance in Wheelhouse every day — flag pricing gaps, underperforming listings, and rate anomalies

Monitor occupancy pacing across all properties and identify listings that need immediate attention

Track competitor rates and market positioning in the Knoxville STR market



Pricing Management



Make rate adjustments in Wheelhouse based on demand signals, pacing data, and market conditions

Build and maintain minimum price floors and maximum rate ceilings for each property

Set and update length-of-stay restrictions, gap-night rules, and last-minute discount settings



Key Date Calendar



Own and maintain the key date calendar — University of Tennessee game weekends, local Knoxville events, holidays, and high-demand periods

Ensure rates are set appropriately for every key date well in advance

Monitor demand signals for upcoming events and adjust proactively



Reporting



Pull and organize weekly performance data — occupancy, ADR, RevPAR across the portfolio

Compile monthly owner performance reports with key metrics and commentary

Flag underperformers and bring data-backed recommendations to the founder



Hostaway



Manage listing updates and reservation-related pricing adjustments in Hostaway as needed

Flag any discrepancies between Hostaway and Wheelhouse data





REQUIREMENTS

Required — No Exceptions:



Hands-on experience managing revenue or pricing for short-term rentals — you must have done this before, not just read about it

Working knowledge of dynamic pricing tools — Wheelhouse, PriceLabs, Beyond Pricing, or similar

Experience with a property management system — Hostaway, Guesty, Lodgify, OwnerRez, or similar

Understanding of core STR metrics — occupancy rate, ADR, RevPAR, pacing, pickup

Strong written English — you will communicate findings and recommendations clearly

Reliable internet, dedicated workspace, and availability overlapping US Central Time (9am–1pm CT minimum on weekdays)



Preferred:



Direct experience with Wheelhouse specifically

Direct experience with Hostaway specifically

Familiarity with the Knoxville, Tennessee market or University of Tennessee event demand patterns

Experience managing 20+ properties simultaneously





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

This is not a task-execution role. We want someone who thinks like a revenue manager — someone who looks at the data every morning, notices what's off, and acts on it without being told.

The right person:



Understands that an empty night is gone forever — urgency around occupancy is in your DNA

Is proactive — you surface problems and opportunities before the founder asks

Is data-driven — you back your rate decisions with numbers, not gut feel

Takes ownership — once you own the portfolio, you treat it like it's your own

Communicates clearly — weekly you will share what you're seeing and what you're doing about it





COMPENSATION



Pay: $600–$900/month USD based on experience

Part-time, approximately 20 hours per week

Long-term role — we are not looking for short-term help

We need availability during out business hours (9:00am - 4:00pm EST 

Candidate provides own computer and reliable internet





HOW TO APPLY

Every item below is required. Missing anything will disqualify your application.



Resume or CV — highlight all STR, revenue management, and pricing experience specifically

Cover letter (2–3 paragraphs) — what STR tools have you used, how many properties have you managed pricing for, and what does your daily revenue management routine look like?

Scenario response — answer this in 3–5 sentences: "You pull up Wheelhouse on a Monday morning and notice one of your properties has 0% occupancy for the next 30 days while comparable listings nearby are at 60%+. Walk me through exactly what you do."

Tool list — tell us which of these you have used and your experience level (beginner / proficient / advanced): Wheelhouse, PriceLabs, Beyond Pricing, Hostaway, Guesty, Lodgify, OwnerRez, Airbnb, VRBO

Availability — your available start date and your working hours in US Central Time

title: Technical LinkedIn Sourcer (IT Staffing - Canada/US)
description:
About Us: We are a highly successful IT Staffing Agency based in North America. We provide top-tier technical talent to massive enterprise clients like TD Bank and Fiserv. We are looking for a highly analytical, detail-oriented LinkedIn Sourcer to become the backbone of our delivery team.



The Role: You will not be calling candidates. Your only job is data mining and list building. Every day, our team will give you specific IT roles (e.g., Senior Java Developer, Cloud Architect). You will use LinkedIn to find 100 perfectly matched candidates and format their data flawlessly into a Google Sheet for our Recruiter to call the next morning.



Your Daily Tasks:

-Execute complex Boolean searches on LinkedIn to find niche IT talent in Canada and the US.

-Review candidate profiles to ensure they match our strict technical requirements.

-Input candidate data (Name, LinkedIn URL, Current Title, Key Tech Stack) into our tracking sheets with 100% accuracy.



Requirements:

-Exceptional written English.

-Strong understanding of IT terminology (You must know the difference between Java and JavaScript, or AWS and Azure).

-High-speed, stable internet connection.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY): 

-Do not send a generic cover letter. To apply, you must message us with your resume and the answers to the "3-Question Practical Test" below. Applications without these exact answers will be deleted immediately.



1. Boolean Logic: Write the exact LinkedIn Boolean search string you would use to find a Software Engineer who has experience with BOTH "Spring Boot" and "Microservices", but you want to EXCLUDE anyone who has the word "Manager" in their profile.



2. IT Knowledge: Briefly explain the difference between "Front-End" and "Back-End" development in two sentences or less.



3. Attention to Detail: What is the name of one of the massive enterprise clients mentioned in our "About Us" section?

title: Legal Assistant/Paralegal
description:
Position Overview



Are you a perfectionist who thrives on organization, precision, and proactive problem-solving? We are seeking a highly motivated, meticulous, and resourceful legal assistant/paralegal to join our fast-paced US based legal team. In this pivotal role, you will be the backbone of our casework—supporting attorneys, managing complex matters, and ensuring outstanding accuracy and operational excellence for every client. If you take pride in flawless execution, anticipate needs before they arise, and are committed to continuous improvement, we want to hear from you.







Key Responsibilities



Hours & Accountability

Consistently achieve or surpass the firm’s case requirements by maintaining sharp focus, discipline, and time management.



Meticulously track and document activities for client matters in legal software for assigned client matters.



Case Management Leadership

Oversee and drive the progression of cases through established processes, ensuring all steps and timelines are executed with precision.



Hold the team to the highest standards for timely and accurate case movement, promptly flagging and escalating any delays for swift resolution.



Legal Research and Drafting Excellence

Conduct thorough, high-level legal research and distill complex information into clear, concise memos, zoning applications, Power Point presentation and correspondence, with minimal oversight.



Deliver documents virtually free of revisions, typos, or errors, setting a high bar for accuracy and clarity.



Operational Support & Process Improvement

Model the firm’s core values by responding to clients and tea
mbers within 24 hours, proactively advancing cases, and sharing knowledge to elevate collective performance.



Champion operational excellence: rigorously follow established processes, leverage AI tools, and proactively recommend workflow and system improvements.



Nurture a community of professionalism and connection by treating every client, colleague, and partner with warmth and respect.



Speak up confidently and constructively when you see opportunities for improvement, demonstrating leadership and unwavering commitment to excellence.







Qualifications



Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Law, Paralegal Studies, Political Science or a related field strongly preferred.

Proven experience as a paralegal or legal assistant in a US based law firm, with a demonstrated track record of accuracy and high performance.

Exceptional organizational, communication, and analytical abilities, with an eye for detail that sets you apart.

Advanced proficiency with legal research tools and technology, including AI-powered platforms.

Ability to excel independently and collaboratively in a demanding, fast-paced environment.





Core Values



Bias for Action: You don’t wait—you initiate, anticipate, and deliver.

Learning and Curiosity: You are always seeking to improve, learn, and ask the next question.

Operational Excellence: You set and maintain the highest standards in every task.

Community and Connection: You build trust and foster positive relationships at every level.

In addition to job security, we also value career growth and advancement. We provide our employees with opportunities to develop their skills and expertise through ongoing training and development programs. We believe in promoting from within and providing our tea
mbers with a clear path for career advancement and promotions.

- Exceptional analytical skills with a passion for problem-solving

At Recur, we believe in supporting and encouraging our employees to take on new challenges and grow within their role. We provide our employees with a supportive environment that encourages them to push their limits, expand their skills, and take on leadership roles within the company. As a long-term goal, we want our applicants to take on a leadership role, train others, and manage a team.



Compensation & Hours:

• 2 YouTube videos you edited

• What software you use

• Your expected price per video

title: Long form YouTube Video Editor
description:
Video Editor – Motorsport YouTube Channel (Part-Time, Ongoing)

$5 USD/hr | ~4 hours/day | Remote



About the Channel

I race formula cars in the Australian Drivers Championship and document it on YouTube. The channel covers real racing, car builds, mechanical work, and sim racing content. Videos range from produced race recaps to raw behind-the-scenes footage of what it actually takes to run a racing car. The audience are motorsport fans who value authenticity — your job is to make the story land and keep people watching.



The Role

I have a steady, ongoing flow of footage and need a reliable editor who can turn around videos within the week. Raw material includes GoPro onboard, phone footage, drone clips, and voiceover commentary. This is not a one-off project. I’m looking for someone I can work with long-term who treats deadlines seriously.

Important: I use 
 to give feedback directly on the timeline. You must be comfortable working within that review workflow inside Premiere Pro. This is non-negotiable.



What You’ll Be Editing

Race recap videos (onboard + commentary + b-roll), car build and mechanical walkthrough content, sim racing and hardware content, behind-the-scenes and vlog-style event footage, occasional YouTube Shorts cuts.



Requirements

Adobe Premiere Pro (proficient, not just familiar), 
 revision workflow experience, able to colour-grade mixed footage sources (GoPro, phone, DSLR), comfortable cutting to voiceover and pacing for retention, basic motion graphics and text overlays, reliable internet for file transfers, strong English comprehension.



What I Need From You

Videos turned around within one week of receiving the brief. Proactive communication — if something will be late, tell me before the deadline, not after. Available for a quick message during your working hours. Accept feedback and revise promptly. Treat this like a professional commitment.



Nice to Have

Interest in or knowledge of motorsport, experience editing YouTube channels with an established audience, ability to put together basic thumbnail compositions, experience handling GoPro footage (compression, fisheye correction).



How to Apply

Send a message with the subject line “MOTORSPORT EDITOR” — this tells me you read the full post. Include links to 2–3 videos you’ve edited (YouTube preferred), a brief description of your Premiere Pro and 
 experience, your availability and typical daily hours, and one sentence on why you’re a good fit for this type of content. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. If you’re reliable and do good work, this role is yours to keep.????????????????

title: Amazon FBA Product Research & Alibaba Sourcing VA (Part-time, Takealot / South Africa)

I run a Takealot store in South Africa and currently do retail arbitrage using Temu. I want to transition my top products to direct importing from China to improve my margins.I’m looking for an experienced Amazon FBA VA who has done product research and Alibaba/1688 supplier sourcing before.Your main tasks will be:Use my existing Takealot product links and Temu links to find the same or very similar products on Alibaba / 1688.Contact multiple suppliers to get quotes (unit price, MOQ, packaging, lead time).Find and compare freight options (air/sea/courier or freight forwarders).Calculate total landed cost per unit in South Africa (product + shipping + estimated duties).Prepare comparison sheets showing how much I will save vs buying on Temu.Requirements:Previous experience as an Amazon FBA VA (product research & supplier sourcing).Strong experience using Alibaba (and ideally 1688).Good English and clear communication.Strong at using Google Sheets / Excel.Nice to have:Experience calculating landed cost and profit margins.Experience with other marketplaces (e.g. eBay, Shopee, Lazada).Workload: initially this is a Gig but going forward~10 hours per week looking for arbitrage products on Alibaba/express/madeinchina/etc. In order to sell on 
 

Budget: R1,500–R2,000 per month equivalent to start, with potential to grow if we work well together.To apply, please:Share your experience with Amazon FBA product research and Alibaba sourcing.Send a sample of a product research or supplier comparison sheet you’ve done before (you can hide sensitive info).Tell me what tools you use for research and costing.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Remote Sales Development Representative

Kelly Agency: Allstate – Pottstown, PA



Our challenge:

The Kelly Agency, a leading Allstate Insurance Agency, is looking for a dynamic Remote Sales Development

Representative to join our Outside Sales Team. Earn a 240 PHP base wage plus daily and monthly bonuses, with

top performers averaging 10,000+ PHP/month in bonuses.



Who we are:

At the Kelly Agency, we are driven by passion and teamwork, committed to building strong personal

relationships. As one of Pennsylvania’s largest remote-friendly Allstate Agencies, we rank in the top 10%

nationwide for new business growth and customer satisfaction. Our team thrives on shared incentives and

continuous improvement, all while maintaining a healthy work-life balance. Embracing cutting-edge technology,

we utilize digital tools such as social media, texting, video, online quoting, and lead management software to

enhance our operations.

We take immense pride in our customer experience, safeguarding what matters most to our clients and their

families. Our core values are: putting customers first, staying positive, being honest, embracing growth, and

working together.



Follow us on Social 

Visit our Website: 



The job description:

Insurance is essential, yet often confusing. As a Sales Development Representative, you'll provide a friendly,

reliable, and informative experience to prospective customers, by connecting with them on the phone and

introducing them to our licensed agents for quoting. This entry-level position offers a career path within our

agency, with opportunities for growth and advancement.



The traits we are looking for:

- Passion for helping people protect their assets and gain peace of mind.

- Highly motivated with a hunter’s mentality.

- Skilled at handling objections while prioritizing customer interests.

- Strong computer skills and the ability to multitask across various programs.

- Drive to win and a willingness to follow our proven success system.



The core job requirements:

- Must have ability to work from home. This includes: a quiet working space, computer, monitor, headset, mouse.

- Make 475+ calls daily to provide warm leads to our licensed agents.

- Pre-qualify insurance prospects for insurability and quality of risk.

- Transfer a minimum of 8 qualified leads to our Outside Sales Team daily.

- Collect and maintain accurate data in the CRM system, including contact information, market data, and

qualifiers.

- Participate in daily meetings to ensure team alignment.



Some benefits we provide:

- Work from home

- 13th Month Bonus

- Paid time off after 180 days

- Health Insurance



Join us at the Kelly Agency and be a part of a forward-thinking, tech-driven team dedicated to customer

excellence and personal growth.

title: Essay Editor/Academic Writer
description:
We’re an academic consulting firm that helps high school students gain admission to top-tier universities in the U.S., and we’re currently seeking a part-time Essay Editor/Academic Writer with strong writing, editing, and critical thinking skills to join our team.



This role is ideal for someone who can take rough or underdeveloped student essays and turn them into polished, well-structured pieces that read naturally and professionally. The position is part-time and flexible, but it’s also deadline-driven and requires strong reliability, responsiveness, and attention to detail.



This is not a general content writing role. We’re specifically looking for someone who can revise and rewrite essays so they are clearer, stronger, and more compelling while still aligning with the original prompt, intended message, and required word count.



Key Responsibilities:

• Edit and rewrite high school-level essays based on specific prompts and word count requirements, improving structure, clarity, grammar, tone, and overall impact.

• Manage multiple essay assignments at once while meeting tight turnaround times, typically within 24–48 hours, and communicate proactively regarding deadlines or issues that may affect delivery.



Applicants should be able to:

• Rewrite and strengthen weak or underdeveloped drafts without losing the original intent, while elevating flow, structure, readability, and overall quality.

• Demonstrate excellent grammar, sentence control, and word choice, and write with a level of polish that reads as fluent and natural in English.



To proceed with your application, please send a message with your resume, 2-3 writing samples for review, and an estimate of how many hours you can commit each week.

title: Appointment Setter - Solar
description:
APPOINTMENT SETTER — SOLAR

Remote | Base + Commission | Full-Time



THE BASICS

Location: 100% Remote

Hours: Full-time  (10am-4pm UK time)

Base Pay: $300 USD/month

Commission: $15 USD per sat (attended) appointment

Minimum Target: 15 appointments/month

Expected Earnings: $750/month at 30 appts | $1,050/month at 50 appts





ABOUT THE ROLE

We run an outbound call centre booking solar assessments for homeowners across the UK. You will be making outbound calls to leads we provide, qualifying homeowners, and booking them in for a solar assessment with one of our consultants.

This is a remote, performance-based role with a guaranteed base — we want people who are serious about earning, not just clocking hours.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Making outbound calls to homeowners across the UK

Qualifying prospects using a script we provide

Booking confirmed, attended appointments into our calendar

Maintaining accurate call notes and daily reporting

Hitting a minimum of 15 sat appointments per month



WHAT WE PROVIDE

Full dialler licence and system access — no cost to you

Proven call scripts and objection handling guides

Lead lists — you won't be sourcing your own leads

Full onboarding and product training before you go live

Weekly pay.



PAY STRUCTURE

Appointments/Month

15 appts/month ? $300 base + $225 commission = $525/month

30 appts/month ? $300 base + $450 commission = $750/month

50 appts/month ? $300 base + $750 commission = $1,050/month

Commission paid from appointment 1. No earnings cap. 2 week day grace period for new starters.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Previous experience in cold calling, outbound sales or appointment setting

Confident, clear spoken English

Self-motivated and able to work independently from home

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

Comfortable with rejection — this is a numbers game and we know it



Nice to have:

Experience in solar, energy or home improvement

Familiarity with diallers or CRM tools

Previous experience with Australian, USA or UK clients

title: Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist (Remote)
description:
Apex Social brings together experienced educators, therapists and care providers with families who have special care needs and provides personal & career development through a unique, collaborative work experience for Care Professionals in a new state or new country.



Our Mission

Unlocking children’s greatest potential through integrating skilled Care Professionals into their family’s daily life.

Empowering Children to develop to their fullest abilities.

Empowering Care Professionals by providing personal & career development, experiential learning and cultural enrichment through a unique, collaborative work experience.

Empowering Families by providing specialized, skilled child care and cultural exchange in the home through an individualized recruiting and matching process.

Empowering Schools & Universities by providing career coaching and support for their students and alumni to gain interdisciplinary paid work experience & continuing education in Germany, the United States and Australia.

Empowering Tea
mbers by providing a collaborative, remote work environment with opportunities for training and growth as well as a commitment to our mission ensuring that we find purpose, fulfillment and a sense of belonging in our careers.



Position Overview:

We’re looking for an experienced recruiter to partner closely with our team and accelerate hiring across multiple roles. This isn’t a traditional VA position—it’s for a highly professional, proactive recruiter who can take ownership of full-cycle hiring, quickly match candidates, and support onboarding after minimal training.



Key Responsibilities:

-Collaborate with Manager and leadership to understand role requirements and priorities.

-Source, screen, and shortlist high-quality candidates efficiently.

-Manage multiple hiring pipelines independently.

-Ensure fast, accurate matching of candidates post-onboarding.

-Maintain candidate engagement and provide updates to stakeholders.

-Recommend process improvements to increase time-to-hire and candidate quality.



Qualifications & Experience:

-Minimum 10 years in HR, recruitment, or talent acquisition.

-Proven full-cycle recruiting experience, ideally in US-based or international contexts.

-Strong judgment in evaluating candidates and making recommendations.

-Experience with agency recruiting or high-volume hiring is a plus.

-Excellent communication, organizational, and stakeholder management skills.

-Able to work independently and hit the ground running after onboarding.



Working Hours: PST or EST Timezone. Occasional flexibility may be required to accommodate urgent scheduling needs or communication with U.S.-based participants.



Compensation and Benefits:

- Competitive salary based on experience and market standards.

- Paid time off, holidays, and remote-friendly work environment.

- Opportunities for professional growth and cross-cultural experience with U.S.-based teams.

title: Healthcare Call Center / Virtual Assistant - Healthcare experience is required.

title: PH Day Shift: Part-Time Intake & Client Support Specialist
description:
Position: Part-Time Intake & Client Support Specialist (Remote – Philippines)

Bonus: $20 USD per lead converted during shift

3 months trial period to permanent staff



Schedule



5:00 PM – 11:00 PM Eastern Time (with a 30-minute break)

Maintain organized, accurate, and complete intake and client records

Track all incoming leads and ensure no inquiries are missed



Follow up with missed calls, voi
s, and unconverted leads



Team Communication

Follow internal workflows and instructions provided by the legal team



Administrative Support

Responsiveness & Coverage



Be available and responsive during scheduled hours, even if call volume is low



Monitor systems continuously for new leads (calls, chats,
s)



Ensure fast response times (ideally within minutes)



Requirements



Excellent written and spoken English with strong grammar, clarity, and professionalism



Strong communication skills with the ability to explain information clearly and confidently



Ability to communicate with compassion, patience, and emotional intelligence



Ability to handle difficult, sensitive, or emotional client situations calmly and professionally



Strong attention to detail and high level of accuracy in data entry and document preparation



Ability to follow scripts while sounding natural and not robotic



Highly reliable and able to work independently



Strong organization and time management skills



Comfortable using CRM systems, Google Docs, and chat/phone platforms



Preferred Qualifications



Prior experience in legal intake, customer service, or call center roles



Experience working with U.S.-based clients



Experience handling sensitive or high-stress client interactions



Familiarity with SEO writing (or willingness to learn quickly)



Reporting Structure



This position reports directly to the firm’s attorney and paralegal



Must be responsive to instructions, feedback, and workflow updates



Compensation



Competitive monthly pay based on experience



$20 USD bonus for each lead converted into a retained client during the shift

What Success Looks Like in This Role

title: Virtual Assistant – Cold Caller (Real Estate Wholesaling)
description:
## **Job Title:** Virtual Assistant – Cold Caller (Real Estate Wholesaling)



### **Job Overview:**

We are seeking a motivated and experienced **Virtual Assistant Cold Caller** to join our real estate wholesaling team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for generating leads, qualifying potential sellers, and setting up appointments for our acquisitions team. This position requires excellent communication skills, a positive attitude, and the ability to handle rejection while maintaining professionalism.



---



### **Key Responsibilities:**



? **Cold Calling**

- Make 1300+ calls to potential property sellers using a provided script a day.

- Follow up with leads through calls, SMS, and
s.

- Overcome objections and build rapport with property owners.



? **Lead Qualification**

- Ask targeted questions to identify motivated sellers (e.g., property condition, mortgage status, reason for selling).

- Determine the seller's level of motivation and urgency.

- Record all lead details accurately in the CRM.



? **Appointment Setting**

- Schedule follow-up calls and appointments for the acquisitions team.

- Ensure all scheduled appointments are logged and confirmed.



? **CRM Management**

- Keep detailed records of all calls and interactions in the CRM (**PropStream, Resimpli, MOJO

- Tag and categorize leads based on motivation level and property status.

- Update lead status and notes after each call.



? **Script and Objection Handling**

- Use a proven cold-calling script while remaining flexible to adjust based on conversation flow.

- Handle objections confidently and professionally.

- Continuously improve call strategy based on feedback and performance.



? **Performance Tracking and Reporting**

- Track daily and weekly call volume, contact rate, and conversion rate.

- Provide daily and weekly reports on call outcomes and lead quality.



---



### **Qualifications:**

- **Proven experience** as a real estate cold caller, telemarketer, or similar role.

- Strong understanding of **real estate wholesaling** and lead generation.

- **Fluent in English** with a neutral or minimal accent (mandatory).

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

- Experience using CRMs like **PropStream, Resimpli, Podio, MOJO DIALER, AND DIALPAD** (preferred).

- Ability to handle rejection and stay motivated.

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.



---



### **Preferred Skills:**

- Experience with **skip tracing** and pulling leads from platforms like **PropStream** or **BatchLeads**.

- Familiarity with real estate contracts and basic industry terminology.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.



---



### **Compensation:**

???? **Hourly rate:** $5 hour

???? **Performance bonus** for closed deal 1% OF SOLD DEAL

????** contest bonuses throughout the month



---



### ? **Success Metrics:**

- **Contact Rate:** 80+ of calls answered

- **Conversion Rate:** 5%–10% of contacted leads qualified

- **Appointment Setting:** Minimum of 6-20 appointments scheduled per week

title: NEMT Dispatcher, Scheduler & Billing Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly reliable, organized, and proactive NEMT Dispatcher & Billing Assistant to support a growing Adult Day Health and Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) organization based in Georgia, USA.

This role combines daily dispatch coordination and weekly/daily billing support. The ideal candidate must be able to manage trip scheduling, communicate effectively with drivers, support route productivity, and ensure billing is submitted accurately and on time.

This is a deadline-driven, operations-critical role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, communicates proactively, and follows through without repeated reminders.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Dispatch Coordination

• Secure and schedule transportation trips daily to support route productivity 

• Assign trips to drivers efficiently based on route flow, availability, and service needs 

• Communicate with drivers throughout the day to support timeliness, attendance, and efficient trip completion 

• Monitor trip coverage and assist with resolving scheduling issues or gaps 

• Confirm drivers have the information needed for assigned trips 

• Communicate changes, delays, or concerns promptly to management 

• Help support efficient daily routing and transportation operations 

Billing & Administrative Support

• Review and process transportation trip logs 

• Submit billing claims accurately and on time 

• Ensure all required claims are submitted by Monday at 12:00 PM EST (non-negotiable) 

• Support ongoing movement toward a more frequent billing workflow as operations grow 

• Provide proof of billing submission (screenshot or confirmation) after each billing cycle 

• Maintain organized documentation and billing records 

• Follow all Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) 

• Identify missing, incomplete, or inaccurate trip information and communicate proactively before deadlines are missed 

________________________________________

Schedule

• Part-time (10–20 hours per week) 

• Must be available during U.S. Eastern Time business hours 

• Must be available Monday mornings (EST) for billing deadlines 

• Must be available for daily dispatch communication and trip coordination 

________________________________________

Compensation

• $5/hour during training / probationary period 

• $6/hour after performance review based on reliability, accuracy, communication, and timeliness 

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

• Strong attention to detail 

• Excellent organization and follow-through 

• Ability to manage deadlines consistently 

• Strong written and verbal English communication 

• Ability to communicate professionally with drivers and management 

• Experience using Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Calendar) or similar tools 

• Reliable internet connection and consistent responsiveness during work hours 

• Ability to follow structured workflows and SOPs 

________________________________________

Preferred (Not Required)

• NEMT dispatch experience 

• Transportation scheduling or route coordination experience 

• Medical billing or claims submission experience 

• Experience working with U.S.-based healthcare or transportation services 

________________________________________

Important Expectations

• This role includes daily dispatch responsibilities and strict billing deadlines 

• Billing must be completed every Monday by 12:00 PM EST without exception 

• Candidate must be comfortable communicating with drivers daily to support timely and efficient operations 

• Missed deadlines, poor communication, or failure to follow workflows directly impact business operations and are taken seriously 

________________________________________

How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A short introduction about yourself 

2. Your experience with dispatch, billing, or administrative work 

3. Your experience communicating with drivers or coordinating schedules 

4. Confirmation that you can meet a Monday 12:00 PM EST billing deadline consistently 

5. Confirmation that you are comfortable with the posted pay structure 

________________________________________

Important Instruction

To be considered, include this phrase at the top of your application:

Billing completed before noon.

Applications that do not include this phrase will not be reviewed.

title: Creative Unicorn (Graphic Design + Video Editing)
description:
Sup, creators!



SimplifyCommerce is a fast-growing e-commerce growth agency that helps brands blow up online without the corporate BS. We’re scrappy, we move at warp speed, and we’re obsessed with making things look insanely good.



We need a visual wizard who lives in Canva, Photoshop, and Premiere/After Effects (or CapCut/DaVinci — we don’t discriminate) to join our remote squad. This isn’t a “follow the brief and shut up” gig — this is a “bring your wild ideas, roast our drafts, and level up with us” gig.



What You’ll Actually Do:



- Turn raw, chaotic footage (shot by us or clients on their iPhones) into scroll-stopping Reels, TikToks, and YouTube ads that make people smash the save button

- Design thumb-stopping static visuals — ads, landing page assets, social posts,
 graphics — from our briefs

- Speak up when you see something mid and make it fire (we want you to call it out)



Eventually: jump into brainstorms, pitch full campaign concepts, and co-create with key account brands



The Deal:

Fully remote — work from your couch, a beach in Palawan, or your friend’s room. We don’t care.

20 hours/week to start (super flexible scheduling)

High performers get bumped to full-time fast 

Real creative ownership — your best ideas will run on our key accounts

You’ll never hear “that’s not in the brand guidelines” if it slaps



You’re Our Person If:

- Your portfolio makes us say “damn” out loud (send it — no portfolio = auto-reject)

- You’re fluent in Canva, Photoshop, and at least one pro video editor

- You’re fast but don’t sacrifice taste

- You’re the type who redesigns your friends’ ugly Instagram stories for fun

- Bonus points: motion graphics, 3D, or you’re secretly a 
 lord



This role is literally designed to turn into a full-time creative track for the right person. Come grow with us.



In your application: 

- Drop your portfolio, earliest start date, and works that you're proud of 



We're ready to be blown away! No boring cover letters. Just show me you can make dope creatives. Let’s make the timeline jealous together!

title: SEO Landing Page Writer & Publisher - Location Pages
description:
We're Better Snacks Co., a healthy vending machine company based in New Jersey, USA. We place clean, real-ingredient snack machines in hockey rinks, gymnastics studios, bowling alleys, and youth sports & play facilities across New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Delaware. We're looking for a detail-oriented writer and publisher to build out two complete sets of SEO landing pages on our Squarespace website: one for every U.S. state, and one for every venue type we serve. Clear templates, instructions, and examples will be provided for everything.



Phase 1: State location pages

You'll duplicate our existing New Jersey landing page and create customized versions for all 50 U.S. states.

For states we currently serve (NJ, PA, DE), content will be tailored with specific cities, counties, and regional details. For states we don't yet serve, the page acknowledges we're not there yet and invites facility managers to register their interest.



Phase 2: Venue type landing pages

Once state pages are complete, you'll build a second set of pages targeting specific venue types. Each page speaks directly to the facility manager of that venue – the language, examples, and pain points are tailored to their world.



Venue types include: Hockey rinks & ice facilities, gymnastics studios, bowling alleys, youth recreation centers & play spaces, and many more 



What we're looking for:

- Strong written English - you'll be editing copy, not copying and pasting

- Familiarity with Squarespace or willingness to learn quickly

- Attention to detail - consistent formatting and correct metadata on every page

- Ability to work independently and flag questions before making assumptions

- SEO awareness is a plus but not required



Project scope:

Phase 1: 50 state pages

Phase 2: 5–8 venue pages



This is a project-based role with a clear deliverable. There is potential for ongoing work updating and expanding pages as we grow into new states and venue types.

title: Part Time Day Shift Legal Intake/Paralegal/SEO Writer
description:

THE NATURE OF THE WORK

mbers

We:



Value kindness MORE than experience

Do not work with abusive clients



WHAT YOU WILL DO

We are highly organized and structured.



HOW WE TREAT OUR TEAM



No yelling, no disrespect — ever

You are valued and respected

You can speak directly to the attorney or head paralegal anytime

No judgment



We support your growth and future — even if you leave one day.



HOW WE WORK



We are PERFORMANCE-BASED, not micromanagement-based.



We care about:



Work being done

Accuracy

Responsiveness



We do NOT care:



How hard you look like you're working

How busy you pretend to be



You don’t need to prove anything.



We even:

Celebrate efficient work



If your work is done correctly:



All calls/messages answered

Articles have no errors

Tasks are completed



You are free to relax during downtime.



REALISTIC EXPECTATIONS



You will work about half to most of your shift most days

There will be ongoing tasks (intake + admin + writing)



We assign work based on:



Difficulty

Quantity

Mental effort

You are not a machine

We build in:



Mental breaks

Sustainable workload



We care about:



Your mental health

Your family

Your long-term happiness



REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Excellent English (spoken + written)

FAST response time

Strong attention to detail

Reliable internet

Consistency



PREFERRED (NOT REQUIRED)



Law firm or paralegal experience

References



Applicants with law firm experience will be prioritized.



COMPENSATION



$600/month base

$20 per client converted

Raises based on performance

Growth into higher roles possible



IMPORTANT



Highly competitive role

First 3 months = trial period



We are looking for someone:



Reliable

Detail-oriented

Kind

Easy to work with



HOW TO APPLY



Please send:

2 references 

Resume 

Draft an article using AI with this topic: “What to Do If Your are Arrested in Brooklyn (Step-by-Step Guide)” make it SEO friendly and comprehensive. 

Answers to the following questions in English in a Youtube video, and send us the link :)

title: Technical Project Manager (WordPress / Web)
description:
We are a growing digital agency managing a portfolio of 150+ client websites. We are looking for a **Technical Project Manager** to take ownership of our day-to-day workflow, task management, and QA process across design and development.



This role is critical in helping the CEO step out of technical QA and ensuring all work is delivered to a high standard.



---



### Responsibilities



**Project & Task Management**



* Turn high-level ideas into clear, structured tasks for developers and designers

* Assign and manage tasks across the team (WordPress developer + graphic designer)

* Ensure all tasks are well-defined before development begins



**Quality Assurance (QA)**



* Review all work before it goes live

* Check responsiveness, layout, forms, and functionality

* Identify issues and ensure they are resolved before completion



**Workflow Management**



* Manage the full process: Design ? Development ? QA ? Completion

* Prevent rework by ensuring clarity upfront

* Keep projects moving efficiently and on time



**Communication**



* Act as the main point of coordination between tea
mbers

* Provide clear updates and flag issues early

* Reduce the need for CEO involvement in day-to-day operations



---



### Requirements



* Strong experience with **WordPress (Elementor required)**

* Understanding of how websites are built (frontend + basic backend concepts)

* Experience managing web projects or working in a digital agency

* Strong attention to detail (this is critical)

* Ability to identify issues without being told

* Clear and professional written English communication



---



### Nice to Have



* Experience with QA processes or testing websites

* Familiarity with tools like Asana, Slack, Google Workspace

* Basic knowledge of performance (page speed, plugins, caching)

* Experience working with multiple websites simultaneously



---



### What Success Looks Like



* Tasks are clear before they reach developers

* Work is QA’d before it reaches the CEO

* Projects move forward without constant supervision

* Fewer bugs, rework, and delays



---



### Important



This is NOT a generic project manager role.



You must:



* Understand WordPress and Elementor

* Be comfortable reviewing website work

* Take ownership of quality and delivery



---



If you’re highly organised, detail-oriented, and understand how websites are built and delivered — we’d love to hear from you.



Please include in your submission:



* Examples of websites you have worked on or managed

* A short explanation of how you would QA a website before launch

* You receive a completed WordPress page from a developer. What specific things do you check before approving it?

* A developer says a task is “done” but you notice issues. What do you do?

* How would you manage multiple website tasks across a developer and a designer?

* What experience do you have with Elementor?

* How do you ensure work does NOT need to be redone?

title: Vendor Coordinator
description:
The Vendor Coordinator at The Nabo Group plays a vital role in managing and strengthening our vendor ecosystem. This position ensures that vendors are onboarded efficiently, remain compliant, and consistently deliver high-quality services to the communities we serve. Acting as the central liaison between vendors and internal teams, the Vendor Coordinator supports both Nabo Group and Nabo Services by managing vendor compliance, credentialing, communications, and financial coordination across platforms such as CINC Systems, VendorPay (AvidXchange), and VIVE.



Key Responsibilities:

Vendor Database & Systems Oversight

- Maintain accurate vendor records in CINC Systems, including contact details, addresses, compliance status, and payment preferences.

- Ensure VendorPay is set as the default payment method when appropriate, and support vendor setup for ACH and banking details.

- Monitor invoice routing and payment statuses; follow up on delayed or rejected transactions.

- Run reports (billing, refunds, processed payments) to monitor VendorPay adoption and billing accuracy.

- Conduct quarterly data audits across CINC, VIVE, and internal systems.



Vendor Onboarding & Compliance

- Manage end-to-end onboarding: W-9s, insurance, licenses, ACH forms, and portal training.

- Drive adoption of the VIVE platform for compliance and credentialing.

- Track and manage expirations of key documents; deliver compliance reports to leadership and Boards.

- Ensure vendors meet community-specific requirements such as COIs and background checks.



Vendor Relationship Management

- Act as the main point of contact for vendor inquiries related to compliance, payments, and documentation.

- Maintain strong relationships with VIP (Vendor Integrated Partners) and coordinate quarterly reviews.

- Proactively recruit and vet vendors in underrepresented categories or locations.

- Create and distribute vendor newsletters, compliance reminders, and event invitations.



Financial Coordination & Invoice Support

- Work with Accounting to configure vendor profiles and payment terms.

- Monitor daily activity in VendorPay; ensure timely and accurate invoice processing.

- Resolve vendor payment issues, including rejected payments, refund requests, and void/reissues.

- Prepare billing data for internal reporting and addendum billing processes.

- Educate Boards on vendor-related costs and compliance expenses.



Vendor Performance & Reporting

- Track vendor KPIs such as responsiveness, service quality, and invoice accuracy.

- Deliver monthly compliance and adoption reports to leadership.

- Support contract renewals and RFP processes by providing vendor scorecards.

- Identify opportunities to improve vendor programs and reduce operational costs.



Cross-Department Collaboration

- Partner with Property Managers to review and approve vendors for bids and RFPs.

- Collaborate with Accounting on reconciliation of payments, credits, and disputes.

- Work with Nabo Services on vendor scheduling and subcontractor management.

- Coordinate with Legal and Compliance on risk management and vendor agreements.



Qualifications:

- 2–3 years of experience in vendor coordination, procurement, or community/property management.

- Strong knowledge of vendor compliance requirements (e.g., insurance, licensing, W-9s).

- Familiarity with CINC Systems, VendorPay (AvidXchange), and VIVE is strongly preferred.

- Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build trusted vendor relationships.

- Proficient in data analysis, reporting, and performance tracking.

- Proactive problem-solver with a customer service mindset.



Working Conditions:

- Remote Work: 100% remote—work from anywhere.

- Monitoring: Use of time-tracking software (Hubstaff) is required.



To Apply:

1. Send an
 ATTACHMENT of your updated resume in PDF format.

2. Please indicate that you're comfortable to start with $6 USD per hour.

3. Please send me a link to your voice recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience and include your OnlineJobs.PH profile link.

4. Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, please indicate the position:

Vendor Coordinator – Your Name



*Applicants who will not follow instructions will be automatically rejected without notice.

* Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.

Looking forward to working with you!

title: Growth Operations Coordinator | Flexible Hours | Long-term
description:

What’s in it for you:

Handling a range of business and personal admin tasks

Editing videos using Riverside.fm

Coordinating outreach to potential workshop partners

Regularly provide suggestions on how to improve processes and save time



Outcome-wise, you’ll be responsible for driving 40+ signups to our workshop every week.



Your growth opportunities at PathPeer:



We promote based on results, not years of experience. High performers grow fast here.



Based on your interests and aptitudes, you’ll be given the opportunity to grow into areas such as:



Advanced Operations (Building systems and implementing new tools)

Marketing (Creating written content / graphics, updating websites) 

Lead Gen (Building relationships with prospects)

Product Development & Research

Career Coaching



This position is for you if you:



You love improving yourself and learning new things.

You have high energy and genuine drive.

You're highly reliable and responsive. 

You have a Type A personality.

You take ownership. When something's broken or could be better, you fix it and tell someone about it.

You proactively flag bottlenecks and give detailed weekly updates without being asked.

You can take direct feedback, own your mistakes, and move forward without getting defensive.

You enjoy control and autonomy. We set a high bar and trust you to rise to it.



What you bring to the table:



Strong written English and communication skills.

Tech-savvy. You’re comfortable picking up new tools quickly and figuring things out.

Sharp attention to detail and organization skills

Basic video editing ability with an eye for quality.

Able to write and maintain clear SOPs.

Prior experience as an operations coordinator, VA, EA, social media manager, or in a sales/support role is preferred



If you don’t have everything on this list, that’s okay. You can still apply, just put in effort on your application to stand out.
