title: Senior AI Engineer (Healthcare LLM Systems and Automation)
description:
About the Role:



We are expanding our AI delivery team and are actively interviewing experienced candidates immediately.

We are a healthcare-focused AI solutions organization working directly with medical practices, MSOs, and healthcare groups across the United States. Our work centers on deploying real-world AI solutions across revenue cycle management, prior authorization, and operational workflows.

This is not a learning role.

This is not a prompt engineering role.



We are hiring professionals who can step into active projects and contribute to production-level AI deployments.



What You Will Work On:

You will be directly involved in designing, building, and optimizing AI systems that operate in real healthcare environments, including:



-Prior Authorization automation and decision support

-Revenue Cycle Management workflow optimization

-LLM-driven clinical and administrative workflows

-Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines for payer policy and clinical data

-Intelligent document processing for clinical notes and payer requirements

-API-based integrations with EHRs, billing systems, and third-party platforms

-Continuous performance optimization of deployed AI systems



Key Responsibilities:



-Design and implement end-to-end AI solutions in production environments

-Build scalable LLM-based systems and retrieval pipelines

-Integrate AI workflows into existing healthcare systems and operations

-Translate operational needs into technical solutions

-Ensure performance, reliability, and accuracy of deployed systems

-Contribute to system architecture and scalability decisions

-Maintain strong engineering discipline, documentation, and version control

-Technical Requirements

-AI / LLM Systems

-Proven experience deploying LLM-based systems in production

-Strong experience with retrieval-augmented architectures

-NLP and document processing experience

-Engineering

-Advanced proficiency in Python

-Experience building APIs (FastAPI or similar frameworks)

-Strong backend and data pipeline experience

-Infrastructure

-Experience with AWS, GCP, or Azure

-Experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS, or similar)

-Containerization (Docker required, Kubernetes preferred)

-Architecture & Systems

-Ability to design scalable, modular AI systems

-Experience with workflow orchestration or custom orchestration logic

-Understanding of microservices and event-driven architectures

-Integration

-Experience integrating with external APIs and enterprise systems

-Healthcare interoperability knowledge (FHIR, HL7) strongly preferred

-Security & Compliance (Preferred)

-Experience working with sensitive data environments

-Familiarity with HIPAA or similar compliance standards



Take Note:  Do not APPLY (IF)



-Your experience is limited to prompt engineering

-You have not deployed AI systems in production

-You rely primarily on no-code or low-code tools

-You cannot clearly explain system architecture

-You are not comfortable in a client-facing, delivery-driven environment

Client-Facing Expectations

-Communicate effectively with healthcare stakeholders

-Translate workflows into AI-driven solutions

-Participate in solution design discussions

-Deliver with accountability and professionalism

-Team Environment

-Execution-driven and performance-focused

-High accountability and ownership culture

-Fast-moving, delivery-oriented environment

-Direct exposure to real-world healthcare operations







This is an opportunity to:



Work on high-impact, real-world systems

Contribute to meaningful improvements in healthcare operations

Be part of a rapidly scaling AI team

Grow into senior and architectural leadership roles

Compensation & Growth

Competitive compensation aligned with experience

Performance-based growth opportunities

Long-term career advancement

Exposure to complex, real-world AI deployments

Immediate Hiring Notice

We are actively reviewing applications and scheduling interviews immediately.

Qualified candidates should expect a fast-moving process, including:

Technical screening

Architecture and systems discussion

Final evaluation



How To Apply?

This is a selective role for experienced AI professionals.

If you have built and deployed real AI systems and can contribute immediately, we encourage you to apply or message directly.

title: Marketing Operations Assistant
description:
About the Company:

We are a fast-growing healthcare and performance practice based in the United States, focused on helping active adults move better, stay out of pain, and continue doing the activities they love long-term.



Our business runs on a high volume of inbound leads driven by digital marketing, events, and partnerships. Everything we do is results-driven, tracked, and optimized.



We are looking for a Marketing Operations Assistant to take ownership of the execution and operations behind our marketing efforts.



This is not a creative or branding role. This is a role for someone who thrives on execution, organization, systems, and data.



The Role (What You’ll Actually Be Doing):

You will be responsible for making sure marketing campaigns, events, and lead systems are executed correctly, tracked properly, and continuously improving. THIS IS A 40 HOUR/ WEEK ROLE.



This role sits at the intersection of:

-Campaign execution

-Event coordination

-CRM management

-Data tracking and reporting

-Lead follow-up systems



Exact Day to Day:

-Plan and coordinate marketing for events (masterclasses, competitions, pop-ups, partner events)

-Manage timelines and ensure all promotions (ads,
s, messaging) are executed on time

-Set up and manage CRM systems for event sign-ups, tracking, and follow-up

-Launch and manage paid ad campaigns (Meta/Google) using established processes

-Monitor performance and flag issues like declining results or ad fatigue

-Track key marketing metrics (leads, cost per lead, conversions, campaign performance)

-Maintain organized dashboards and provide regular performance updates

-Build and maintain backend systems in GoHighLevel (automations, forms, landing pages)

-Keep all marketing operations organized, accurate, and running efficiently

-Take ownership of execution so nothing gets missed and everything moves forward



If something is missed, disorganized, or not tracked — this role owns fixing it.



Skills & Traits Required (This Is Who Wins in This Role)



This role is not for everyone. The right person will naturally align with the following:

-Life is in order: health is a priority (exercise and diet)

-Execution-Focused

-Highly Organized

-You keep systems clean, structured, and easy to understand.

-Detail-Oriented

-You catch small mistakes before they become big problems.

-Ownership Mentality

-You don’t wait to be told what to do. If something is off, you fix it.

-You hit deadlines, follow through, and communicate clearly.

-Tech-Comfortable

-Confident, accountable, and reliable 100% of the time



You can learn platforms like:

-Meta Ads Manager

-GoHighLevel

-Google Sheets / dashboards



Experience Requirements



2+ years in:

-Marketing operations/ project management

-Digital marketing support

-Experience with Meta Ads Manager (strongly preferred)

-Experience with GoHighLevel (highly preferred)



Logistics

-Strong English fluency required

-Must have overlap with PST business hours

-Reliable internet + quiet work environment (if you frequently do not have access to internet, do not apply)



Why This Role

-Work directly with the business owner in a fast-growing company

-Be involved in real campaigns, real data, and real results

-Build high-value skills in marketing operations and systems

-Long-term growth opportunity in a performance-driven business



TO APPLY:

 
 with subject - MARKETING OPERATIONS ASSISTANT

Include the following

include a resume, previous work you've done, and what skills you have which will be most valuable for this position (note: you will be tested on these skills)

title: SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER
description:
Job Title: Social Media Content Manager

Location: Remote 

Job Type: Full-Time 



About Us:

We are a fast-growing digital creator brand operating multiple channels across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat, and
. Our content includes family entertainment, challenges, vlogs, skits, pranks, slime content, and lifestyle videos. We are looking for a Social Media Content Manager who can oversee all posting, platform organization, scheduling, and audience engagement across short-form and long-form content.



Position Overview:

The Social Media Content Manager will be responsible for managing our entire social ecosystem. This includes posting, scheduling, optimizing content, writing titles/captions, monitoring trends, engaging with our audience, reminding the team to capture photos/videos, and ensuring consistent daily activity on all platforms. You will work closely with our creators, editors, and content team to keep content flowing smoothly.



Responsibilities:

• Content Posting & Scheduling

• Post all short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube • • • Shorts,
 Reels, Snapchat Spotlight).

• Post all long-form content on YouTube and
 when needed.

• Upload and schedule posts at the optimal times for each platform.

• Maintain a cross-platform posting calendar.

• Ensure all drafts are properly captioned, titled, tagged, and ready for posting.



Content Management:

• Remind the team daily to take photos, behind-the-scenes, and spontaneous content.

• Organize and manage content folders from editors and creators.

• Track what has been posted, what’s scheduled, and what still needs to be filmed.

• Request additional footage from creators when content gaps appear.



Audience Engagement:

• Respond to comments, messages, and community interactions across all platforms.

• Monitor trending comments or feedback and report insights to the team.

• Encourage audience engagement through questions, CTAs, and community polls.



Optimization & Strategy:

• Research and stay up to date with social media trends, audios, formats, and hashtags.

• Track analytics to determine the best posting times, top-performing content, and weekly growth.

• Write engaging titles, captions, and thumbnail text that improve retention and click-through.

• Identify content opportunities from trends and present weekly ideas to the team.



Brand & Platform Consistency:

• Keep messaging consistent across all accounts.

• Ensure all posts represent the brand voice and style of the creators.

• Maintain an organized archive of previous posts for reference.



Daily Tasks:

• Post content across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, Snapchat, and
.

• Upload long-form videos as needed and optimize titles/descriptions.

• Remind creators to take photos and videos throughout the day.

• Engage with audience comments and messages.

• Track performance of yesterday’s posts.

• Update the content calendar with new posts, drafts, and scheduled items.

• Review trending audios, 
s, and formats for potential use.





Weekly Tasks:

• Prepare and present a weekly social media performance report.

• Review analytics and refine posting times/tactics accordingly.

• Meet with the content team to plan weekly filming needs.

• Pull the best photos and clips for next week’s posts.

• Create draft captions, titles, and posting templates.

• Identify weekly trends relevant to our brand.

• Maintain organization of all content folders and archives.

• Suggest 5–10 new short-form content ideas per week.



Qualifications:

• 1–3 years of social media experience (creator or influencer marketing preferred).

• Strong understanding of TikTok, YouTube, Instagram,
, and Snapchat algorithms.

• Excellent writing skills (titles, captions, descriptions).

• Ability to multitask and stay extremely organized.

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, content-heavy environment.

• Knowledge of trending audios, formats, 
 culture, and viral-style editing.





KINDLY DO THE TRIAL TASK:



• Complete a real-world scenario based on supporting Ameerah. The scenario would be busy content week travel, brand deals, and multiple posts due and your task is to create a 1-week organized plan. This should include a content calendar (Tiktok, Youtube Shorts, Instagram), a simple daily schedule for the creator and a checklist of tasks.

Send/Attached the Google Drive link of your output along with your application.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Energi

Energi (NRG) is a scalable and secure blockchain ecosystem, designed to power the next generation of Web3 applications, DeFi protocols, and NFT marketplaces. Built on a robust Proof of Stake (PoS) infrastructure, Energi combines Ethereum compatibility, on-chain governance, a self-funding treasury, and a Layer 2 masternode network to drive innovation in decentralized technology.

Our remote-first team spans the Americas, Europe, Africa, Asia, and Oceania, working together to push the boundaries of blockchain scalability and security. With a growing network of global contributors, we are committed to building a blockchain that is not only secure but also developer-friendly and highly scalable.

Energi is engineered to support millions of users, making it an ideal platform for high-performance dApps, NFT marketplaces, and decentralized finance solutions. Our ecosystem is designed for fast, cost-effective transactions with a focus on long-term sustainability.

By fostering collaboration, innovation, and a forward-thinking culture, Energi is redefining the Web3 landscape. Explore our vision and mission at 
.





WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU:

-Work flexible hours from anywhere as part of a globally distributed team driven by innovation and shared values.

-Directly shape the future of blockchain technology in NFT development.

-Enhance your skills and creativity with cutting-edge blockchain, smart contract, and Web3 technologies.

-Be part of an advanced blockchain ecosystem and contribute to building next-gen NFT platforms.

-Competitive pay structure in a 50/50 split of ETH and NRG tokens.



Front-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We seek a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer specializing in NFT platforms to drive the front-end development of our decentralized applications. You’ll create immersive Web3 experiences while integrating blockchain-based features like Metamask and smart contracts.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Work closely with UX designers to create seamless NFT marketplaces and dApps.

-Develop interactive front-end features integrating Web3.js and smart contracts.

-Optimize UI performance and ensure mobile responsiveness.

-Maintain existing applications and introduce new blockchain features.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of experience in front-end development.

-Proficient in React, Gatsby, and Web3 frameworks.

-Experience integrating blockchain wallets like Metamask.

-Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.

-Fluent English communicator with a passion for blockchain.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Experience with Web3, Infura, and The Graph.

-Familiarity with NFT metadata standards and ERC-721/ERC-1155.

-SEO optimization skills.



Back-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We’re looking for a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer to build the backend for NFT applications. You’ll be responsible for designing, maintaining, and optimizing APIs that connect blockchain smart contracts with scalable Web3 applications.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Develop secure APIs that interact with NFT smart contracts.

-Optimize backend infrastructure for high-traffic NFT transactions.

-Implement blockchain indexing solutions for NFT metadata retrieval.

-Write unit tests to ensure security and efficiency.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of back-end development experience.

-Proficiency in Golang, NodeJS, and GraphQL.

-Experience with blockchain data structures and decentralized storage.

-Passionate about blockchain innovation and fluent in English.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Knowledge of smart contract security best practices.

-Prior experience with NFT minting platforms.

-Remote work experience.



This role is not open to 3rd party organizations or agencies. Any candidates sent will be considered free of any charges



Energi is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, pregnancy, disability, age, veteran status, or other characteristics.

title: Amazon FBA Product Research Datadive Specialist
description:
Job Type:



Project-Based / Part-Time (Recurring Research Projects)



Pay:



$7 USD per completed DataDive



Overview



We are looking for an experienced Amazon FBA product research specialist who is already very familiar with DataDive (Brandon Young method) and Jungle Scout and can begin work right away.



This is not an entry-level VA role.



You must already know how to use these tools professionally.



Tools You MUST Already Know



DataDive (Brandon Young methodology, most important)



Jungle Scout (Catalyst & Product Database)



Google Sheets



If you need training on these tools, please do not apply.



Project Structure



Each project consists of 100 DataDives



After full completion of 100 DataDives, there may be no work for several months, then another project begins.



We expect to complete 400–500 DataDives over the next year.



Your Responsibilities

1. Product Discovery



Use Jungle Scout Catalyst 



Work within niches we specify



Apply correct price and revenue filters we specify



Identify strong product ideas for DataDive



2. DataDive Execution



Select at least 10 (15 is better) very similar competing products. If there are not 10 very similar competing products to select then a datadive can't be done for this niche.



Identify when niches should be split into multiple valid dives



(example: battery vs rechargeable versions)



Run separate DataDives when appropriate



3. Keyword Cleanup



Clean the Master Keyword List



Remove brand names



Remove irrelevant phrases



4. Keyword Expansion



Review Outliers and Residue keywords



Add relevant phrases when appropriate



5. Product Scorecard



Complete as much of the product scorecard in DataDive as possible



6. Google Sheet Reporting



For each DataDive, provide:



Link to the completed DataDive



Average variations per seller (found in Master Keyword List section)



Average price (found in Master Keyword List section)



Average listing age (found in Master Keyword List section)



Search volume percentage (found in Overview section)



Average rating (found in Master Keyword List section)



Important Notes



We care about correct execution, not on finding “good” products



Some DataDives will be strong, many will not — this is expected



You must be able to work independently and follow the workflow accurately



How to Apply



Please include:



Your experience using DataDive 



How long you have been doing Amazon product research



Confirmation that you are familiar with Brandon Young’s DataDive method



Any examples of past research work (optional)



Applications without real DataDive experience will not be considered.

title: Amazon FBA Product Research Specialist (DataDive & Jungle Scout Expert)

Overview



We are looking for an experienced Amazon FBA product research specialist who is already very familiar with DataDive (Brandon Young method) and Jungle Scout and can begin work in the next 7 days without training.



This is not an entry-level VA role.

You must already know how to use these tools professionally.



Tools You MUST Already Know



DataDive (Brandon Young methodology, most important)



Jungle Scout (Catalyst & Product Database)



Google Sheets



If you need training on these tools, please do not apply.



Project Structure



Each project consists of 100 DataDives, completed in stages:



Trial Phase



First 5 DataDives



Then paid $50 with PayPal



Validation Phase



Next 20 DataDives



Reviewed



Then paid $200 via PayPal



Production Phase



Remaining DataDives completed in batches of 25



Each batch paid $250 via PayPal 



After full completion of 100 DataDives, there may be no work for several months, then another project begins.

We expect to complete 400–500 DataDives over the next year.



Your Responsibilities

1. Product Discovery



Use Jungle Scout Catalyst and Product Database



Work within niches we specify



Apply correct price and revenue filters we specify 



Identify strong product ideas for DataDive



2. DataDive Execution



Select at least 10 (15 is better) very similar competing products. If there are not 10 very similar competing products to select then a datadive can't be done for this niche. 



Identify when niches should be split into multiple valid dives



(example: battery vs rechargeable versions)



Run separate DataDives when appropriate



3. Keyword Cleanup



Clean the Master Keyword List



Remove brand names



Remove irrelevant phrases



4. Keyword Expansion



Review Outliers and Residue keywords



Add relevant phrases when appropriate



5. Product Scorecard



Complete as much of the product scorecard in DataDive as possible



6. Google Sheet Reporting



For each DataDive, provide:



Link to the completed DataDive



Average variations per seller (found in Master Keyword List section)



Average price (found in Master Keyword List section)



Average listing age (found in Master Keyword List section)



Search volume percentage (found in Overview section)



Average rating (found in Master Keyword List section)



Important Notes



Payment is based on correct execution, not on finding “good” products



Some DataDives will be strong, many will not — this is expected



DataDives that are intentionally manipulated to improve metrics will not be accepted or paid



You must be able to work independently and follow the workflow accurately



How to Apply



Please include:



Your experience using DataDive and Jungle Scout



How long you have been doing Amazon product research



Confirmation that you are familiar with Brandon Young’s DataDive method



Any examples of past research work (optional)



Applications without real DataDive experience will not be considered.

title: URGENT HIRING | Data Engineer
description:
IMPORTANT: If you are interested and qualified, please submit a link to your resume AND your voice recording to 
 will only process applications of those who will send both. Applications sent through OLJ will be automatically discarded. DO NOT apply if you do not have the experience.



About the Role

We are seeking a highly skilled Data Engineer to design, build, and maintain our data infrastructure, with a strong emphasis on data integration, architecture, and pipeline development. The ideal candidate will have expert-level SQL and Python skills and a deep understanding of data modeling, ETL processes, and system integrations.

This role requires a strong technical foundation, problem-solving skills, and the ability to work across teams to enable data-driven decision-making. You will play a crucial role in optimizing data flows and ensuring efficient data storage, access, and processing.

This is a full-time remote position, and the candidate should be comfortable working in either the Pacific Standard Time (PST) or Eastern Standard Time (EST) timezone

Key Responsibilities

Data Integration & Pipeline Development: Design and implement scalable ETL/ELT pipelines to integrate data from multiple sources into a centralized data platform.

Data Architecture: Develop and maintain robust data models, schemas, and warehouse structures to support analytics and business intelligence needs.

SQL & Database Management: Write and optimize complex SQL queries for data transformation, extraction, and performance tuning.

Python Development: Build and maintain automation scripts, data transformation processes, and API integrations using Python.

Scalability & Performance Optimization: Ensure data systems are optimized for performance, reliability, and scalability.

Collaboration: Work closely with data analysts, data scientists, and software engineers to support data needs across the organization.

Monitoring & Debugging: Implement logging, monitoring, and alerting solutions to ensure data integrity and pipeline health.





Qualifications & Experience

5+ years of experience in data engineering, software development, or a related field.

Expert proficiency in SQL, including performance tuning, query optimization, and database management.

Expert-level Python skills, including experience with data processing libraries (e.g., Pandas, PySpark, SQLAlchemy).

Strong experience with data integration across APIs, third-party services, and internal systems.





Deep understanding of data architecture principles, including data modeling, warehouse design, and distributed systems.

Experience working with cloud-based data platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure, Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift).

Familiarity with workflow orchestration tools (e.g., Apache Airflow, Prefect, Dagster).

Experience with version control (Git), CI/CD pipelines, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus.

Hands on working with ELT/ETL tools along with API based ingestion using code.





Preferred Skills

Knowledge of streaming data technologies (e.g., Kafka, Kinesis, Pub/Sub).

Familiarity with data governance, security, and compliance best practices.



IMPORTANT: If you are interested and qualified, please submit a link to your resume AND your voice recording to 
 will only process applications of those who will send both. Applications sent through OLJ will be automatically discarded. DO NOT apply if you do not have the experience.

title: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $800–1,100 USD/month (based on portfolio/skills)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week), Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver (PST) overlap for feedback



---



THE VISION



Prismiera - luxury jewelry.



We're going to be building cinematic para-social content on Instagram/TikTok, with flexibility to pivot formats based on what the platform is rewarding. Realistic, stylized, dark feminine aesthetic, mythology underneath, luxury fashion on the surface. Think if a high-end fashion editorial had lore and a storyline.



The content follows a simple rhythm: our heroine talks to camera like a real person — casual, smart, magnetic — then something cinematic happens that changes everything you just saw. The audience replays it.



We're hiring for taste first, artistry, cinematography, humor, and technical execution. We provide all AI tools and training if needed. You bring the instinct.



THE CONTENT MIX



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption.

25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end execution of viral formats and humor. The premise can be unhinged; the visuals never break luxury canon.

10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. The algorithmic wildcard.



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Cinematic skits.



NO: Generic CapCut presets. Generic motivational reels. Anything made in Canva.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Produce original IG Reels and TikToks — parasocial content into cinematic reveal

- Build cinematic skits around our AI personas using trending formats and dark humor

- Integrate AI-generated characters into edits so they feel like they belong in the scene, not pasted on top

- Learn and use frontier AI generation tools (we provide paid accounts + training if needed)

- Music-sync editing — cuts married to the beat, rhythm as a storytelling weapon

- Design for platform behavior — what gets saved on IG, what loops on TikTok

- Ramp from 3–5 pieces/week to 6–10 at steady state



REQUIREMENTS



- Portfolio that makes us stop scrolling — we're evaluating taste, creative vision, and editing execution as a package. All three matter.

- Music-sync editing instinct (AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits — any genre)

- Work that has atmospheric, cinematic depth — layered compositions, light/shadow awareness, visual storytelling that goes beyond straight cuts and generic Capcut presets. Whether you achieve this in After Effects, Premiere, DaVinci, or anything else doesn't matter. The output is everything.

- Strong English, clear async communication, reliable deadlines

- Coachable — takes direct feedback and iterates fast



BONUS (affects your rate): After Effects proficiency, AI generation experience (Kling, Veo, Seedream), color grading, typography, sound design



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run your editing software and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



THE DEAL



- Paid trial: $150/week standard. For candidates with strong existing signal, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 for a single deliverable.

- All AI tool subscriptions provided

- Creative ownership from day one — you define how a luxury brand looks on social

- Direct feedback on every edit

- Rate growth tied to capability growth

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon, with two more AI-native brands incubating behind it



COMPENSATION: $800–1,100 USD/month based on portfolio and skills. Editors with compositing ability and AI generation experience start higher. Bi-weekly payments after confirmed hire.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your favorite movie]

Use 7+ apply points.



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit that is aspirational, aesthetic, fashion-adjacent, or a skit showing platform-native instinct. The feeling and execution matters.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE music-driven edit. (Can overlap with #1.)



3. Portfolio link (optional). If you have a reel, channel, or portfolio beyond the two links above that you are proud of, drop it here!



4. The Two-Act Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given footage of our AI heroine sitting in a dimly lit restaurant, a dark atmospheric beat, and her voice talking casually about something she noticed about the people around her. Act 1 is the conversation. Act 2 is the cinematic reveal. Pitch both halves — what does she say, what does the audience see, and what is the reveal? Humorous? Epic?



5. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). Your experience with generative AI tools. If none, let us know.



6. Hardware. CPU / GPU / RAM / upload speed.



7. Turnaround. Given existing footage, potential music track, and an established template — how long for a 15–20s piece? How long for a 45s stitched cinematic AI video?



8. The Rewrite. Make this dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: Remote Patient Scheduling & Lead Conversion Specialist (Chiropractic Office)

 ? Warm and conversational over text

To apply, please send your resume with the subject line: 'YOUR NAME - VA Position - PINEAPPLE to

title: Senior AI Systems Engineer
description:
AI Systems Engineer



Internal AI Automation & Agent Development

Reports to: CTO 



If you're interested in applying please submit our culture test here: 
. 



Role Overview



This role is responsible for building and scaling AMZ Prep’s internal AI systems and automation layer across the business.



You will design and deploy AI-powered systems that improve how our company operates across sales, operations, customer success, finance, and reporting.



This includes building autonomous agents, event-driven workflows, and real-time systems that reduce manual work, improve accuracy, and increase output per employee.



You will work closely with operations, customer success, finance, sales, and leadership to identify high-impact problems and replace them with scalable, production-grade systems.



This is not a research role.

This is a build and ship role.



Our Values



Our team operates with a few simple principles that guide how we work. If these do not resonate, this role is not for you.



Win Relentlessly



We work hard and stay resilient when things get difficult. We push to raise the bar every day and are obsessed with delivering results. We move fast, adapt quickly, and build systems that actually get used.



Own the Outcome



We take responsibility for results. We do not wait for direction. When something breaks, we fix it and ensure it does not happen again. We ship, measure, and improve continuously.



Be Humbly Confident



We communicate directly and operate without ego. We challenge ideas, accept feedback, and focus on building better systems.



Obsess Over Data

We measure everything. Time saved, cost reduced, errors eliminated. Data drives what we build and how we improve.



The Mission



Build AI systems that:

- Eliminate manual work across the company

- Increase output per employee

- Improve operational intelligence and decision making



Your work must produce measurable ROI.



What You Will Build



These are real systems we are actively building:



Sales Systems

- Agents that process call data, update CRM, and drive next actions

- Systems that monitor pipeline health and flag risks

- Automated proposal and quoting workflows



Marketing Systems

- Content generation and distribution engines

-Lead capture, enrichment, and routing workflows

-Systems that connect marketing output to pipeline and revenue



Operations Systems

-Freight and logistics agents that handle quoting, booking, and tracking

-Real-time monitoring systems for SLA and operational performance

-Internal copilots to support operations and customer success teams



Internal Tools and Automation

-AI assistants across departments

-Automated reporting and decision systems

-Internal platforms to standardize how AI is deployed across the company



What You Must Have Done

-5+ years of software development experience

-Built and deployed real systems into production

-Worked with APIs, data flow, and backend systems

-Integrated AI or LLMs into real workflows

Owned systems end-to-end from idea to deployment



If your experience is primarily building demos or chatbots, this is not the role.



Technical Expectations



You should be strong in several of the following:



Backend development (Python, Node, or similar)

API integrations and system design

Event-driven or distributed systems

Working with queues, background jobs, or real-time workflows

Cloud infrastructure (AWS or GCP)

Databases and data pipelines



You should be comfortable:



Building systems that run continuously, not one-off scripts

Designing for reliability, scale, and performance

Shipping quickly and improving over time

Bonus Experience

Experience with Java or Spring Boot

Experience building internal tools or automation platforms

Experience with monitoring and observability tools

Experience with real-time or low-latency systems

Exposure to logistics, supply chain, or operations



How You Think



You think in systems, not features.



You naturally ask:



How do we eliminate manual work completely

How do we design this to run without human involvement

How do we make this reliable at scale

How do we measure impact clearly



You are comfortable working in messy environments and turning them into structured, scalable systems.



What Success Looks Like



Within 90 days



Multiple production systems deployed

At least one manual workflow fully replaced

Clear, measurable impact delivered



Within 6 months



Core AI systems used across teams

Significant time savings across key workflows

Repeatable internal approach to building and deploying AI systems

Interview Expectations



You will be asked to:

- Walk through real systems you have built

- Show working demos or code

- Explain architecture decisions and tradeoffs



We care far more about what you have shipped than what you say.



If you're interested in applying:

1. Apply using the culture test here: 
 

2. Send a LOOM video showing us the best piece of work you've built and introduce yourself 

3. Attach your GITHUB link inside too 



(Failure to do all 3 will make sure you don't get the first round interview)

title: Senior Recruiting & Talent Operations Manager
description:
Senior Recruiting & Talent Operations Manager



AI-Enabled Hiring & Talent Systems

Reports to: COO 



Role Overview



This role is responsible for building and scaling the hiring engine at AMZ Prep.



You will own sourcing, recruiting, and hiring across key functions including operations, sales, customer success, and engineering.



Your primary goal is to consistently bring in high-quality candidates at speed while building systems that make hiring faster, more predictable, and less dependent on manual work.



This is not a traditional HR role.

This is a high-output recruiting and talent operations role.



You will combine strong recruiting execution with AI and automation to scale hiring across the company.



Our Values



Our team operates with a few simple principles that guide how we work. If these do not resonate, this role is not for you.



Win Relentlessly

We move fast, work hard, and push for results. Hiring is a competitive advantage and we treat it that way.



Own the Outcome

You are accountable for hiring results. Not activity. Not effort. Results.



Be Humbly Confident

We communicate directly, give feedback, and focus on improving constantly.



Obsess Over Data

We track pipeline, conversion rates, time to hire, and hiring quality. Data drives decisions.



The Mission



Build a recruiting engine that:



Consistently delivers high-quality candidates

Enables high daily interview volume

Reduces time to hire across all roles

Uses AI and automation to remove manual work

What You Will Do

Recruiting Execution

Source, screen, and interview candidates across multiple roles

Manage full-cycle recruiting from outreach to offer

Partner with hiring managers to define ideal candidate profiles

Maintain strong pipelines across priority roles

Talent Pipeline & Outbound



This is a high-output role.



You will be expected to:



Send 200+ outbound messages per week across LinkedIn and

Maintain consistent daily sourcing and outreach activity

Build and manage structured pipelines of qualified candidates

Continuously improve messaging and targeting

Interviewing & Screening

Conduct 5+ candidate calls per day

Quickly assess candidate quality and fit

Identify top performers early in the process

Move strong candidates through the funnel quickly

AI-Driven Recruiting Systems



You will use AI to increase output and reduce manual work.



Use tools like ChatGPT and Claude to improve sourcing, outreach, and screening

Build simple automations for scheduling, follow-ups, and tracking

Create workflows to summarize interviews and extract insights

Continuously improve efficiency using AI



Process & Operations

Build structured hiring processes across roles

Track and improve funnel conversion rates

Create visibility into pipeline performance

Optimize for speed and quality



HR & People Operations



You will support core HR functions to ensure a strong employee experience.



Build and improve onboarding processes for new hires

Maintain clear documentation for roles, responsibilities, and expectations

Support performance tracking and basic KPI frameworks across teams

Help implement structured review and feedback processes

Ensure a consistent and positive employee experience



Process & Operations

Build structured hiring processes across roles

Track and improve funnel conversion rates

Create visibility into hiring and team performance

Continuously optimize for speed and quality







What You Must Have Done

5+ years of recruiting or talent experience

Experience hiring across multiple functions

Proven ability to run high-volume recruiting pipelines

Strong interviewing and candidate evaluation skills

Experience working in fast-paced environments

Technical Expectations



You do not need to be an engineer, but you must be highly capable with AI tools.



You should be comfortable:



Using AI tools daily to increase output

Building simple automations

Working with ATS and CRM systems

Creating repeatable workflows

How You Think



You think in output and systems.



You naturally ask:



How do I get more qualified candidates per day

How do I reduce manual work using AI

How do I improve conversion rates

How do I build a repeatable hiring engine



You are:



Fast and execution-focused

Organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable being measured on performance

What Success Looks Like



30 Days



Strong pipelines built

Consistent outreach and interview cadence



90 Days

- 200+ outbound messages per week

- 5+ candidate calls per day

- Improved pipeline quality and speed



6 Months

- Scalable recruiting system in place

- AI-driven workflows supporting hiring

- Reduced founder involvement in recruiting

The Opportunity



This role can evolve into:



Head of Talent

Director of Recruiting

Owner of the company’s hiring engine

Application Process



We are looking for operators, not coordinators.

This process is designed to reflect how you will actually work.



To apply, complete the steps below.



1. Culture Test



Submit here:





2. Loom Video (5 to 8 minutes)



Record a Loom walking through:

- Your background in recruiting, Human Resources  and roles you have hired for

- How you use AI in your workflow now 



A role you filled and how you approached it



To really stand out:



Find our founder on LinkedIn, connect with him, and get in front of him directly. 



Approach it the same way you would when trying to reach top candidates we want to hire.



Show us how eager you are!

title: Brand Designer & AI Content

Roofing Product Launch

title: Appointment Setter (Cold Calling – US Insurance Agency, Long-Term Role)
description:
We are a growing insurance agency based in Texas, USA, looking for a reliable and hardworking appointment setter to join our team long-term.



Your role will be to call leads, follow up, and book appointments for our licensed agents. We provide the leads, scripts, and training — you bring consistency and strong communication.



Responsibilities:

Call warm and aged leads (we provide data)

Send follow-up texts when needed

Set qualified appointments on our calendar

Track calls, notes, and outcomes in our system

Meet daily call and appointment targets



Work Schedule:

Must be available during US Central Time (Texas hours)

Typical shift: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

Full-time preferred (30–40 hours/week)



Requirements:

Strong English speaking skills (clear, confident)

Experience in:

Cold calling / telemarketing

Appointment setting

Comfortable making 100+ calls per day

Reliable internet and quiet workspace

Headset and computer required

Able to handle rejection and stay consistent



What We’re Looking For:

Reliable and shows up on time every day

Not just reading scripts — able to have real conversations

Coachable and open to feedback

Motivated to hit targets and earn bonuses



IMPORTANT:



This role requires heavy outbound calling. Only apply if you are comfortable being on the phone for most of your shift.



To Apply (REQUIRED):

Start your application with the word “Booked”

Send a 30–60 second voice recording introducing yourself or doing a sample call

Describe your cold calling experience

Confirm your internet speed and work setup

Confirm your availability in US Central Time



Compensation:

Hourly pay (based on experience)

Bonus per qualified appointment

Opportunity for long-term work and raises based on performance



About Us:



We are a small, growing insurance agency focused on helping customers find better coverage at better prices. We value hard work, consistency, and long-term relationships.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media Manager (Creative & Brand-Led)

Company: ELY Marketing (Australia)



About ELY Marketing

ELY Marketing is a strategic marketing agency working with premium, travel and tourism and experience-led brands.

We don’t believe in generic content or trend-copying. Our work is grounded in brand strategy, storytelling, and creative execution that feels intentional, elevated, and human.



About the Role

We’re looking for a creative Social Media Manager with a strong eye for branding and an innovative mindset.

This role is for someone who understands that social media isn’t just about posting consistently. It’s about shaping perception, building brand presence, and turning attention into 
ntum.

You’ll be responsible for ideation, content planning, and execution across multiple client accounts, ensuring each brand shows up with clarity, confidence, and consistency.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Developing and managing social media strategies aligned to brand and business goals

- Creating and executing content plans across Instagram,
, TikTok, and LinkedIn

- Identifying trends early and elevating them to fit each brand’s voice and aesthetic

- Writing captions that are engaging, on-brand, and human

- Creating Reels and short-form video concepts

- Designing creatives that resonate with the target audiences

- Managing posting schedules, engagement, and community interaction

- Monitoring performance and adjusting content direction as needed





What We’re Looking For

- Strong creative instincts and a modern, brand-aware aesthetic

- Ability to think conceptually, not just execute tasks

- Deep understanding of Instagram and TikTok trends and formats

- Experience managing multiple client accounts

- Confidence working independently and taking initiative

- Comfortable in an agile environment where we move fast

- Excellent written English and communication skills

- Strong attention to detail and consistency





Tools & Skills

- Experience with Instagram, TikTok,

- Canva (required)

- Video editing tools (CapCut)

- Scheduling tools (Metricool)





Working Arrangement

- Full-time role (40 hours per week)

- Remote position

- Long-term opportunity for the right person

- Work with a collaborative, creative team and premium brands





Portfolio Required

Your portfolio is the most important part of your application.



Please include:

- Examples of social media accounts you’ve managed

- Reels or short-form video examples

- Any branding or elevated content examples

- A brief explanation of your role in the work





Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



How to Apply

Please include:

- A short introduction about yourself

- A link to your portfolio

- Your availability

- Your expected hourly or monthly salary

title: Electrical CAD Operator
description: We are looking for a freelancer to convert PDF drawings to DWG format, apply the correct scale, and overlay them onto existing floor plans. The drawings are electrical plans. The job is expected to take 2–3 days to complete. If the work quality is satisfactory, we may offer a full-time position.

title: Matterport, CAD & Revit Specialist (Construction & Design)
description:
Position Overview



WR Builders Inc. is seeking a highly skilled Matterport, CAD, and Revit Specialist to support our growing construction and design team. This role is critical in translating real-world site conditions into accurate digital models, drawings, and construction documents.



The ideal candidate has strong experience in 3D scanning (Matterport), AutoCAD drafting, and Revit modeling, and understands residential construction workflows, including renovations, additions, and new builds.



Key Responsibilities

1. Matterport & Site Documentation

Perform or process Matterport scans of project sites

Convert scans into accurate floor plans and as-built drawings

Extract measurements, dimensions, and spatial data for estimating and design

Maintain organized digital records of all scanned properties

2. CAD Drafting (AutoCAD)

Produce detailed 2D drawings, including:

Existing conditions (as-builts)

Demolition plans

Proposed layouts

Construction details

Update drawings based on field conditions and team feedback

Ensure all plans meet USA building codes and standards

3. Revit Modeling (BIM)

Develop 3D Revit models from Matterport scans and CAD files

Create:

Floor plans

Elevations

Sections

3D visualizations

Coordinate models with architects, engineers, and project managers

Maintain organized BIM standards and file structures

4. Coordination & Collaboration

Work closely with:

Project Managers (PMs)

Assistant Project Managers (APMs)

Designers

Estimators

Support pre-construction and design phases with accurate documentation

Assist in value engineering by identifying design conflicts early

Qualifications

Proven experience with:

Matterport (or similar 3D scanning tools)

AutoCAD (advanced level)

Revit (intermediate to advanced)

Strong understanding of:

Residential construction (kitchen, bathroom, additions, ADUs)

Construction drawings and terminology

Ability to read and interpret architectural and structural plans

High attention to detail and accuracy

Strong organizational and communication skills

Preferred Qualifications

Experience working with general contractors or design-build firms

Knowledge of USA building codes and permitting processes

Experience with Buildertrend or similar project management software

Familiarity with estimating or takeoffs is a plus

Work Structure

Full-time or part-time (flexible based on experience).

Candidates who include:



Sample as-built from Matterport ? CAD conversion

Revit model from a real project

Experience with U.S. construction standards



…will be prioritized.

title: Pinterest Ads Manager – Scaling Expert
description:
Pinterest Ads Manager (Scaling Focus – Full-Time)



We are a fast-growing international e-commerce company looking for an experienced Pinterest Ads Manager to scale winning products on Pinterest. This is a performance-driven role for someone who understands how to take campaigns from testing to aggressive scaling.



What We’re Looking For:



Proven track record of scaling Pinterest ad campaigns with strong ROI

Ability to work independently and make data-driven decisions

Experience with grey-hat / restricted category products on Pinterest

Strong understanding of European markets (NL, BE, FR, etc.)

Deep knowledge of Pinterest creatives, hooks, and scaling strategies



Job Requirements:



Must be available daily between 7:00 AM – 10:00 AM PH Time (for communication with our team in the US)

Full-time position only – cannot be combined with other jobs

High level of attention to detail and accountability



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT):



To be considered, follow these steps exactly:

Start your application with: Pinterest -Ready to Scale

Include the following:

Your Pinterest experience

Campaign results (metrics, scaling levels, etc.)

Strategies you’ve used



Answer the following in detail:

Top 3 products you have scaled on Pinterest + timeframe in which you scaled them

How long it typically takes you to see results with your scaling strategy

A breakdown of your scaling approach and strategy

Your experience (if any) with grey-hat products and how you avoid bans/suspensions

End your application with your favorite fruit.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



If you’re confident in your ability to scale on Pinterest and want to be part of a serious, fast-moving team — we want to hear from you.

title: Prop Firm Trader / Day Trader (FX/Futures/Crypto)
description:
Hello Traders!



Isla Capital is growing — and we’re looking to bring on disciplined, serious traders to join our team.



We work with experienced prop firm traders to trade evaluation and funded accounts through firms such as FTMO, Apex, Alpha Capital Group, and similar platforms.



This opportunity is designed for Filipino professionals who understand prop firm rules, respect risk, and can trade with consistency and control.



This is not a casual trading role — it is a structured, performance-driven environment with a clear path toward higher earnings and long-term growth. Over time, this role will expand into live portfolio trading, where earning potential increases significantly.



What You’ll Do...



• Trade prop firm evaluation (challenge) accounts and funded accounts

• Strictly follow all prop firm rules and drawdown limits

• Maintain daily trading journals

• Provide consistent performance updates



What We’re Looking For...



• Experience trading prop firm accounts

• Strong risk management and discipline

• Ability to work independently

• Honest and reliable communication

• Understanding of scalping and/or day trading strategies



Compensation & Growth...



• Weekly base salary potential

• Bonus for passing evaluations / challenges

• Profit sharing on funded account payouts

• Performance bonuses based on payout milestones

• Access to in-house coaching from experienced traders



Important Notes...



• Accounts must be registered under the trader’s name (per prop firm rules), but all accounts and profits are part of Isla Capital

• All prop firm fees and account costs are fully covered by Isla Capital

• Strict confidentiality is required



Who This Is For...



This is a performance-first opportunity for traders who take their craft seriously.



We are building a system where disciplined Filipino traders can earn meaningful income and grow long-term within a structured trading environment.



If you are consistent, controlled, and committed — this could be a strong fit.



How to Apply...



Please apply and include:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your prop firm experience

• Your trading style and psychology

• Resume or link to resume (if available)



Let's build something serious together!

title: Sales & Operations VA
description:
About Gutter Guru

Gutter Guru is a growing commercial gutter cleaning company serving property managers, HOAs, and commercial clients across the country. We connect customers with a trusted network of local subcontractors and pride ourselves on reliable service, clear communication, and professional results. As we scale, we're looking for a detail-oriented tea
mber to support our sales and operations pipeline.



Role Overview

The Sales & Operations Coordinator plays a critical behind-the-scenes role in keeping Gutter Guru's growth engine running. You'll own our outbound lead generation, daily
 outreach, contact data management, and financial tracking — ensuring our pipeline stays full and our books stay clean. This is a high-accountability role for someone who is organized, persistent, and comfortable working across multiple tools and workflows simultaneously.



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation

- Research and identify potential leads using LinkedIn and Apollo based on target customer criteria

- Collect key contact information including name, company, and
 address

- Add and maintain leads in the designated Google Sheets folder, ensuring all records are accurate, complete, and properly formatted for outreach campaigns

- Keep lead lists clean and organized for use in YAMM mail merge campaigns



Daily
 Outreach (YAMM)

- Execute daily outbound
 campaigns using YAMM (Yet Another Mail Merge) via Gmail — approximately 50–60
s per sending account per day

- Set up correct
 templates and verify merge fields are accurate before each send

- Review YAMM reports after each campaign and record key metrics 
s sent, opens, replies, etc.) in the tracking sheet

- Maintain organized documentation of all outreach results for reporting and performance review



Phone Number Research

- Work through existing contact lists to locate and add missing phone numbers

- Source numbers by reviewing
 conversations, signatures, and other available records

- Update Pipedrive CRM with all discovered contact information



Subcontractor Payments

- Process payments to subcontractors and track payment schedules

- Confirm subcontractors are paid accurately and on time

- Maintain organized payment records for internal reporting



Accounts Receivable Management

- Monitor outstanding customer invoices and follow up on pending or overdue balances

- Communicate professionally with customers regarding payment status

- Record received payments in both the CRM and QuickBooks to keep financial records up to date



What We're Looking For

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail — data accuracy is non-negotiable

- Comfortable working with tools like Google Sheets, LinkedIn, Apollo, YAMM, Pipedrive, and QuickBooks

- Self-starter who can manage daily workflows independently without heavy oversight

- Clear communicator, both written and verbal

- Prior experience in lead generation, sales support, or administrative operations is a plus



Why Gutter Guru

- Flexible remote work environment

- Clear processes and workflows — you'll know exactly what success looks like

- A growing company where your contributions have a direct impact

- Collaborative, no-nonsense team culture



Please apply using the link below:

s

title: Video Editor & Social Media Marketer
description:
We’re a social media agency based out of Singapore looking for a social media marketer and video editor on a part-time basis.

s - raw cuts will be provided)

title: Cold Caller / SDR — US B2B Outbound | $6/hr + Bonuses (Multiple Positions, Part-Time 30 hrs/wk)
description:
EARN $780-$1,100+/MONTH — MULTIPLE POSITIONS OPEN



We're a small US-based digital marketing agency serving ecommerce brands. We manage paid advertising (Google Ads, Meta Ads) and help clients grow profitably. We're building out our outbound sales team and hiring multiple cold callers.



THE ROLE



You will cold call US-based ecommerce business owners and marketing directors to book 20-minute discovery meetings. That's the job — book meetings. You're not closing deals, writing proposals, or managing accounts.



This is high-volume outbound dialing using a power dialer. If you're energized by conversations and comfortable hearing "no" 50 times a day, keep reading.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Cold call
US prospects per day using a power dialer (we provide it)

- Follow a provided script — you'll be trained, not left to figure it out

- Book discovery meetings via Calendly

- Log activity in a shared tracking sheet

- Leave pre-recorded voi
s and send templated follow-up texts

- Join brief daily check-ins via video



SCHEDULE



- 30 hours/week (Mon-Fri, 6 hours/day)

- Must overlap with US business hours (Pacific or Eastern time)

- Consistent daily schedule required



COMPENSATION



- $6/hour base (30 hrs/wk = ~$780/month)

- $75 bonus per booked meeting that is attended by the prospect

- $250 bonus when a booked meeting converts to a signed client

- 13th month pay

- 2-week paid trial at full base rate



Realistic monthly earnings once ramped: $780-$1,100+



WHO THRIVES IN THIS ROLE



- You've done cold calling before and actually liked it

- You don't take rejection personally

- You're coachable — you follow the script first, then suggest improvements

- You show up on time, every day, without being chased

- You want a long-term position, not a 2-week gig



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Full cold call script and objection handling playbook

- Power dialer — no personal phone needed

- Lead lists — you do not source your own leads

- Paid training during your first week (mock calls, script practice, tool setup)

- Accent coaching resources (ELSA Speak subscription + pronunciation training materials)



REQUIREMENTS



- Clear spoken English (you will be voice tested — accent is fine, clarity is what matters)

- Previous cold calling experience preferred (B2B preferred, not required)

- Reliable internet + quiet workspace

- Backup internet (mobile hotspot)

- Laptop or desktop with USB headset



TO APPLY — READ THIS CAREFULLY



Applications without BOTH of the following will not be reviewed:



1. Record a 60-second voice memo introducing yourself as if you are cold calling a business owner. Say: "Hi [Name], I'm calling from a US digital marketing agency. We help ecommerce brands get better results from their advertising. I had a quick question about your ad spend — do you have 30 seconds?" Upload to Vocaroo and include the link.



2. How many cold calls did you make per day in your most recent calling role? If you have no cold calling experience, say so honestly and tell us what relevant experience you have.



We review voice memos first. If your English is clear and energetic, you'll be invited to a short Zoom interview.

title: HubSpot Specialist (CRM Admin / Technical Execution)
description:
Overview



We are a HubSpot consulting practice looking for a hands-on HubSpot Specialist to support backend CRM execution across multiple client accounts.



This role is execution-focused, not strategy. You will be responsible for building, configuring, and maintaining HubSpot systems based on defined requirements.



You will work directly with the founder and a project manager to deliver clean, scalable HubSpot implementations.



---



What You’ll Be Doing



HubSpot Configuration & Builds



Create and manage properties, pipelines, and custom objects



Build and maintain workflows (automation, assignment, lifecycle updates)



Create and manage lists, forms, and basic
 automations



Set up and maintain dashboards and reports



Data Management



Perform imports and data cleanup



Manage deduplication and data normalization



Maintain proper associations (Contacts, Companies, Deals, Custom Objects)



QA & Troubleshooting



Test workflows and automations before deployment



Identify and fix issues with workflows, properties, and data



Ensure consistency across portals



Documentation



Document builds, logic, and configurations



Maintain clear internal notes for future scalability



---



Requirements (Must-Have)



2+ years of hands-on HubSpot experience



Proven experience building:



Workflows (not just viewing/editing)



Properties and data structures



Reports and dashboards



Strong understanding of:



Contacts, Companies, Deals, and lifecycle stages



Pipelines and deal stages



Associations between objects



Experience with:



Data imports and cleanup



Deduplication strategies



Strong attention to detail (this is critical)



---



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience with:



Custom objects



HubSpot APIs or integrations (Zapier, Make, etc.)



Sales Hub / Marketing Hub advanced features



Experience working in an agency or multi-client environment



---



How You Work



You are detail-oriented and double-check your work



You can follow requirements and execute without constant supervision



You communicate clearly and flag issues early



You are comfortable working inside structured processes (ClickUp, SOPs, etc.)



---



What This Role Is NOT



Not a strategy role



Not a marketing/content role



Not just
 building



Not a beginner HubSpot position



---



Compensation



Competitive hourly rate (based on experience and location)



Long-term opportunity with consistent work



Potential to grow into a senior technical role

To Apply (Important)



Please include:

Describe the trigger, logic, and outcome

What was the problem and how you solved it



3. Short answer:



> How would you handle duplicate contacts with the same
 but different data?



Applications without these answers will not be considered.

About Us



We are a HubSpot-focused consulting firm specializing in CRM architecture, data structure, and RevOps execution across multiple industries.
